The dog wakes up from some noise. the guy asks what's up. the dog walk to across the room to a closed closet door. noise coming from inside. the guy walks up and gets ready to open the door and calms the dog.

prompts.text: SUBJECTS: A male street dance expert, white buzz cut, wearing small gold hoop earrings and a gold rope chain. Dressed in a dark brown hoodie, a pure white crew neck shirt underneath, dark brown loose pants, and white sneakers. ENVIRONMENT: Pure seamless background, slightly cool gray tone, clean space with no distractions. STYLE: cinematic realism, studio dance film, high contrast clean lighting Timeline 0:00-0:02: Full body, 24mm, low-angle fast push-in The dancer bursts directly into motion at high speed, right foot stomping the ground while the body performs a powerful rotation, left leg sweeping wide to create large spatial displacement, upper body hits and releases in sync 0:02-0:03: Full body, 28mm, tracking side move He performs continuous large cross steps and sliding combinations, feet rapidly crossing while driving lateral movement, the jacket swings with strong inertia from the motion 0:03-0:05: Full body, 28mm, orbit He transitions into continuous rotating footwork, rapidly switching pivot points with both feet to achieve multiple directional changes, forming an arcing trajectory in space 0:05-0:06: Low angle, 24mm, forward pressure He suddenly drops low, one hand touching the ground for support, quickly transitioning into floor movement 0:06-0:07: Low near-ground angle, 24mm, tracking Both legs sweep rapidly to complete a full power sweep rotation, the body forming a high-speed circular motion around the supporting arm, then using the momentum to spring back up 0:07-0:08: Full body, 28mm, tilt up He explosively rises from the ground, landing on both feet and immediately executing a full-body wave, while continuing to move forward 0:08-0:10: Half body to full body, 35mm, forward tracking He enters a high-speed pop locking sequence, upper body locking precisely on beats while the footwork continues to move and shift directions, increasing motion density 0:10-0:12: Full body, 28mm, pull back to open space He transitions into larger groove and jumping step combinations, steps becoming wider while still precisely on beat, body remains fully extended 0:12-0:14: Low angle, 24mm, fast push-in He suddenly accelerates, stomps the ground with his right foot to launch upward, performing a fast aerial rotation while fully extending his limbs 0:14-0:15: Full body fully in frame, 35mm, slight push-in lock He enters a one-hand support freeze mid-air while maintaining motion inertia, body fully extended horizontally, legs stretched into clean lines, the entire figure fully visible in the frame

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 prompt ----------------------- 15-second cinematic horror short, ultra-realistic VFX, IMAX-style cinematography, perfect deep focus and massive scale contrast, photorealistic, no dialogue. A luxurious cruise ship dinner party at night. Warm amber lighting from crystal chandeliers, white tablecloths, silverware, elegantly dressed passengers chatting and raising glasses, a pianist playing soft music. Suddenly, subtle tremors begin. Shot-by-shot: [0:00-0:04] Medium tracking shot inside the elegant banquet hall. Guests are laughing and toasting. Red wine in glasses starts forming concentric ripples. The crystal chandelier sways very slightly. No one notices yet. A second, stronger vibration — water splashes from glasses, a lady’s spoon slides out of her bowl. People start exchanging uneasy glances. [0:04-0:08] Wide shot pulling toward the large windows. The ship tilts noticeably to the left. Cutlery slides and clatters across tables. Passengers grab onto tables and chairs. Everyone turns to look out the windows. The black ocean surface begins to glow with deep blue-green bioluminescence spreading from the depths below, illuminating a huge area around the ship. The light pulses slowly, matching a human heartbeat. [0:08-0:12] Rapid close-up montage: The pianist’s fingers freeze above the keys as he sees the glow reflected in the piano lid. A young child presses their face against the glass — outside, an enormous eye slowly rises, its iris arc alone filling the entire panoramic window. Cut to exterior side view: the massive cruise ship is reduced to a tiny white line compared to the glowing silhouette of a colossal creature ten times longer than the ship lurking beneath the surface. [0:12-0:15] Epic high-angle aerial pull-back shot. The entire cruise ship becomes a minuscule glowing dot on the dark ocean. Around it, massive glowing curves emerge from the abyss, forming a giant ring-shaped pattern — an enormous eye looking up from the depths, with the ship positioned exactly in the center of the pupil. The scale is mind-bending. The bioluminescent pulses slowly fade, the light disappears, and the ocean returns to complete blackness. The ship stabilizes. Final freeze frame on the terrified faces inside the hall. Everyone knows it’s still down there. Global style: Ultra-photorealistic deep-sea horror, IMAX cinematic quality, perfect deep focus, dramatic scale contrast between the tiny ship and the gigantic creature, warm amber interior lighting versus cold deep blue bioluminescence, subtle volumetric god rays in water, realistic water physics and ship movement, flawless VFX integration, high emotional tension, no text or deformities.

prompts.text: A seamless 15-second luxury fragrance commercial for Aurum Summer EDP. Do not show the storyboard — use scenes only as reference. Scene 1 (0–3s): slow cinematic push-in on the gold Aurum Summer bottle standing on white desert sand, golden hour light wrapping around the glass, long shadow stretching forward. Scene 2 (3–6s): macro close-up of perfume mist spraying from the nozzle, golden particles suspended mid-air against warm backlight, slow motion. Scene 3 (6–9s): aerial drift shot — bottle resting on sand surrounded by scattered jasmine petals and dried orange peel, camera slowly rotating overhead. Scene 4 (9–12s): elegant hand with warm skin tone raises the bottle against a blurred Dubai skyline horizon, sun flaring softly behind the cap. Scene 5 (12–15s): cinematic final — bottle on a stone ledge, desert wind softly scattering petals, "Aurum Summer" fades in center frame in thin gold serif, "Made in Dubai" appears below in smaller text. Transitions: slow dissolve between every scene. Camera movement: smooth slow push-ins and drifts throughout, no cuts — fluid motion. Lighting: consistent warm golden hour throughout, amber and gold palette. Audio: deep oud-influenced ambient score with subtle modern electronic undertone, prestigious and cinematic. Male voiceover — deep Saudi Arabian English accent, slow authoritative delivery: "Born from the desert. Crafted in Dubai. Aurum Summer — by Ajal." Mood: prestige, warmth, Middle Eastern luxury, aspirational.

prompts.text: Daytime, ancient Roman coliseum arena. YOUR IMAGE - based on uploaded photo, face fully visible throughout. Body oiled, dust and sand streaked across skin, minimal chest armor plate leaving arms and shoulders bare, leather bracers, sandaled feet. Low-angle wide shot: fifty thousand spectators, heat haze rising. He stands at center, chest heaving, weapon raised. Opposite iron gate creaks open. Silence drops. A massive saber-tooth tiger steps into sunlight—muscular, prehistoric, curved ivory fangs gleaming. They lock eyes. The crowd erupts. The tiger launches—explosive speed, devouring distance. Side tracking shot parallel to both at full sprint. He waits—last moment—drops into a low roll. Claws slice inches from his face, sand blasting outward. He rises to one knee. First blood: a clean scratch across his forearm. He looks. Then up. The tiger leaps at his chest—bullet time. Full 360 orbital rotation mid-air: fangs extended, sand frozen, sweat beads suspended, his body twisting into a desperate counterstrike. Time snaps back—violent impact. Both thrown apart. He crashes, rolls, staggers up. The crowd surges. Ramp motion. The tiger circles. He mirrors it. Tight close-up: sand on cheek, breath controlled, eyes locked. Feint left—he holds. Feint right—he steps in, forearm jammed against its jaw, gripping its neck, full weight driving it down for a brutal second. Muscles strain. Roars collide. He breaks free, spins away, stands tall—arms out—faces the crowd. Wide pull-back: both twenty feet apart. Both bleeding. Arena torn. Silence. He lowers his weapon. Lifts his chin—defiance toward the crowd. Hard freeze frame. Title-card energy. High drama, realistic, no animation.
prompts.display_text: Daytime, ancient Roman coliseum arena. YOUR IMAGE - based on uploaded photo, face fully visible throughout. Body oiled, dust and sand streaked across skin, minimal chest armor plate leaving arms and shoulders bare, leather bracers, sandaled feet. Low-angle wide shot: fifty thousand spectators, heat haze rising. He stands at center, chest heaving, weapon raised. Opposite iron gate creaks open. Silence drops. A massive saber-tooth tiger steps into sunlight—muscular, prehistoric, curved ivory fangs gleaming. They lock eyes. The crowd erupts. The tiger launches—explosive speed, devouring distance. Side tracking shot parallel to both at full sprint. He waits—last moment—drops into a low roll. Claws slice inches from his face, sand blasting outward. He rises to one knee. First blood: a clean scratch across his forearm. He looks. Then up. The tiger leaps at his chest—bullet time. Full 360 orbital rotation mid-air: fangs extended, sand frozen, sweat beads suspended, his body twisting into a desperate counterstrike. Time snaps back—violent impact. Both thrown apart. He crashes, rolls, staggers up. The crowd surges. Ramp motion. The tiger circles. He mirrors it. Tight close-up: sand on cheek, breath controlled, eyes locked. Feint left—he holds. Feint right—he steps in, forearm jammed against its jaw, gripping its neck, full weight driving it down for a brutal second. Muscles strain. Roars collide. He breaks free, spins away, stands tall—arms out—faces the crowd. Wide pull-back: both twenty feet apart. Both bleeding. Arena torn. Silence. He lowers his weapon. Lifts his chin—defiance toward the crowd. Hard freeze frame. Title-card energy. High drama, realistic, no animation.

prompts.text: Blood Moon Approaches Eclipse Moon Vampire Princess Ultra-cool transformation transition effect, recreating popular short videos Seedance 2.0 All-in-One Reference Prompt Shot One: Everyday Home Scene Time Segment: 0:00 to 0:02 Shot Distance and Type: Medium shot, handheld follow-cam Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera subtly sways with the character's movements, with a light, upbeat, and lively rhythm. The camera follows the trajectory of the girl's arm waving, finally facing the prop she raises. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The girl is wearing white loungewear pajamas patterned with Crayon Shin-chan designs and a bear hairband. She holds a sheet of white paper rolled into the shape of a telescope. She first playfully waves this "paper telescope" with a smile on her face, then directly aims one end of the "paper telescope" at and fully presses it against the lens, using the physical darkness inside the paper tube to block the frame, creating a perfect transition medium. Visual Effects: No obvious effects, belonging to everyday real-light-and-shadow recording. Cleverly utilizes the dark circular hole inside the paper tube rolled into a telescope shape as a physical transition entry medium. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Warm white tones, bright. Mood is relaxed, everyday, and lively, laying the groundwork for the dramatic contrast to follow. Shot Two: Spacetime Tunnel Transition Time Segment: 0:02 to 0:04 Shot Distance and Type: Close-up transitioning to full wide shot, first-person perspective push-in Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera rapidly pushes forward at high speed, visually as if directly penetrating the inner hole of the "paper telescope" the girl pressed against the lens in the previous second, delivering an extremely strong visual impact and a sense of extreme speed. Main Subject Actions and Expression: No character subject, primarily showcasing the process of traversing space. Visual Effects: Intense CG visual effects, deep red vortex and wormhole effects with a strong sense of suction and spatial distortion, followed by bats flying out from the depths of the frame as visual guides. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Interwoven dark red and black. Mood shifts instantly from relaxed to mysterious, dangerous, and filled with a sense of the unknown. Shot Three: Vampire Princess Descends Time Segment: 0:04 to 0:06 Shot Distance and Type: Overhead full wide shot transitioning to medium shot, panning camera (downward pan) Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera pans from top to bottom, aligning with the character's upward gaze, with speed transitioning from fast to slow motion, creating tremendous visual tension. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The transformed vampire princess (white hair, elven ears, white ornate gown, red nails) gazes up at the lens from below, extending one hand toward the lens as if inviting or casting a spell, her expression alluring yet brimming with dangerous allure. Visual Effects: Strong slow-motion (high-frame-rate) treatment, with a large amount of red petals or light-spot particles drifting in the foreground, a red magical halo floating above the character's head, and a background of intersecting black Gothic tree branches and net-like structures. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Intense dark red blended with high-contrast cool white tones. Mood is mysterious, seductive, and infused with Gothic opulence. Shot Four: Alluring Freeze-Frame Time Segment: 0:06 to 0:09 Shot Distance and Type: Medium close-up, with a slight handheld push-pull feel Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera remains relatively fixed but with a breathing and subtle tremor sensation, syncing with the music's beat for a strong rhythmic pulse. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The character holds the extended-hand pose, lightly touching her lips with the other hand, her gaze locked directly on the lens, her expression radiating immense allure and oppressive intensity. Visual Effects: Incorporates frame-skipping, rapid flickers, subtle screen distortion (glitch-fault style), and radial blur effects, paired with high-frequency red light flashes to amplify visual impact and cyberpunk vibes. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Large areas of high-saturation red background, with the character at the absolute visual center. Mood is high-energy, intensely visually aggressive. Shot Five: Blood Moon Flight Time Segment: 0:09 to 0:12 Shot Distance and Type: Long shot, fixed camera Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera remains steady, with elements in the frame exhibiting a slow floating sensation. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The character unfurls massive demonic wings, hovering in the night sky in an expansive pose. Visual Effects: Grand scene compositing, with a massive blood moon in the background, rendered with dark red cloud layers; slow-motion flocks of bats accompany in flight, evoking a powerful epic atmosphere. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Dark fantasy tones dominated by black and red. Mood is grand, awe-inspiring, and brimming with dominance, perfectly echoing the video's theme.

prompts.text: 0:00–0:03 The shot dives down from high above, carrying strong forward momentum, slightly tilting and accelerating. In the distant background, a massive pale moon scatters soft light through the cloud layers. Two enormous sacred statues emerge in the thin mist—they are noble angelic guardians with refined, harmonious facial features. The shot precisely threads between them, maintaining its forward inertia. 0:03–0:06 The shot seamlessly continues its downward spiral motion, tracing the curve of the architecture without any cuts. Ahead, a majestic stone bridge is perched upon by a grand dragon. As the shot approaches, the dragon turns, exhaling a broad, flowing stream of flame. The flames unfurl like a luminous veil along the path. The shot rolls slightly, gliding beneath the flames in a single continuous motion, entering the bridge's shadow, then moving forward along the underside structure, naturally transitioning to the canal below. 0:06–0:09 Maintaining the same motion path, the shot emerges from the bridge's shadow, drawing close to the canal's water surface. The water reflects soft firelight and the surrounding architecture. The shot continues forward, passing through a lower archway. It reveals a breathtaking scene: marble ruins, carved columns, gentle statues, light diffusing through the water. The shot moves underwater along its forward trajectory, then naturally ascends toward a fountain outlet, breaking through the surface while preserving direction and momentum. 0:09–0:12 The shot flips with its inertia, sweeping across a vast ritual plaza. Hundreds of soldiers stand in formation. The leader faces the army. He strides forward powerfully, raising a lightning spear high to channel energy upward. The soldiers respond in unison with a forceful, synchronized roar, raising their weapons like a wave. Fine electrical particles begin to gather in the air, dust and embers seemingly drawn upward by the energy. The shot weaves through the ranks at low altitude. 0:12–0:15 The shot ascends along a spiral path toward a mountaintop platform, sustaining its motion. Fire basins ignite sequentially along the way. As the shot rises, a massive dragon suddenly bursts through the mist layer from the side, flying close across the frame, its wings scattering the thin fog and light. The shot reaches the summit. The leader stands elevated, facing the army, spear held aloft. The sky is compressed by dense cloud layers, energy converging, as a massive bolt of lightning descends from above, connecting directly to the spear and forming a controlled continuous current. The entire scene is illuminated by the lightning, with the soldiers below roaring in unison once more. In the distance, another dragon slowly circles. The shot pulls back steadily, revealing the full scale: layered mists, flames dotting the scene, the moon lingering as a subtle backdrop. The visual style is live-action cinematic photography, with continuous physical camera movement, natural inertia, no CGI feel, authentic textures, real atmospheric perspective, subtle imperfections, and no stylized artifacts.

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 Prompt share! SEC 0–1: Handheld tracking shot. A giant sentient cheeseburger sprints down the alley at full speed, sesame seeds rattling, lettuce flapping wildly, clutching a glowing duffle bag under one bun. Panicked eyes. Heavy footsteps splashing through puddles. Camera shakes with urgency. SEC 1–2: Whip-pan ahead. A caped tabby cat drops from above and lands hard in the burger's path — three-point superhero landing, cracks the pavement. Dust pops outward. Eyes glow green. One paw up. The burger skids trying to stop, ketchup spraying from its heels like tire smoke. SEC 2–3: Snap to slow motion. The cat lunges forward with a single devastating open-claw strike straight through the burger's midsection. Cheese, lettuce, and pickles erupt outward in slow-mo. The bag flies loose from the burger's grip, tumbling through the air. SEC 3–4: The cat snatches the bag mid-air with one paw, spins, and lands facing camera. Cape whips around and settles. The burger collapses behind, ingredients scattering across the wet ground. Tomato slice rolls to a stop.SEC 4–5: Push-in on the cat's face. Slight smirk. Rain drips off the cape. Eyes flash. Hard cut to black. Title slam: THE CLAW. Bass hit.

prompts.text: Seedance 2 is out globally on Freepik! 🎸 And now you got to learn how to prompt for it. So I went ahead and made a Spaces workflow for you - link below. And here's a prompt for you to kick off: [STYLE] Ultra-high detail Pixar-quality cinematic animation, 8K, soft global illumination, individual hair and fur strands, realistic fabric simulation, shallow depth of field, warm cozy lighting [FORMAT] 16:9, cinematic multi-shot scene, slow tension build [SCENE] Cozy bedroom at night with strong 80s personality, colorful retro posters on walls, desk with glowing computer, warm lamp. [CHARACTERS] A young man with short dense curly blonde hair forming soft rounded clumps, pale skin, slightly tired blue eyes, wearing a black hoodie A golden retriever with thick light golden fur and expressive eyes. [CAMERA SYSTEM] Smooth cinematic camera, slow push-ins, medium and close shots, no jitter. A scene showing the guy coding. The dog wakes up from some noise. the guy asks what's up. the dog walk to across the room to a closed closet door. noise coming from inside. the guy walks up and gets ready to open the door and calms the dog.

prompts.text: **Environment:** A surreal floating mountain range above a sea of clouds under a pale indigo twilight. Massive ice pillars rise from the floating terrain while fragments of glacier drift slowly through the air as if gravity is weakened. The sky glows with soft aurora ribbons casting cool turquoise and violet diegetic light across the frozen landscape. **Action:** 15.0s sequence. A colossal white tiger with luminous frost patterns across its fur stalks across the floating ice plateau. Opposing it is a crystalline dragon formed from fractured ice shards and refracting light. They collide in a rapid aerial and ground exchange as the dragon coils around the floating cliffs while the tiger leaps between suspended ice fragments. Velocity Ramp choreography: the tiger launches into a massive mid-air pounce as time slows dramatically — frost crystals and snow particles freeze in mid-air before snapping back to full speed as the impact shatters a floating glacier slab. **Camera:** Low gliding tracking shot across the floating ice surface before tilting upward to follow the tiger’s leap through drifting glacier fragments. **Style & Constraints:** Photorealistic fur simulation, ray-traced ice refraction, volumetric aurora lighting, cinematic cold atmosphere, 35mm film grain, 8K resolution. prompts.display_text: **Environment:** A surreal floating mountain range above a sea of clouds under a pale indigo twilight. Massive ice pillars rise from the floating terrain while fragments of glacier drift slowly through the air as if gravity is weakened. The sky glows with soft aurora ribbons casting cool turquoise and violet diegetic light across the frozen landscape. **Action:** 15.0s sequence. A colossal white tiger with luminous frost patterns across its fur stalks across the floating ice plateau. Opposing it is a crystalline dragon formed from fractured ice shards and refracting light. They collide in a rapid aerial and ground exchange as the dragon coils around the floating cliffs while the tiger leaps between suspended ice fragments. Velocity Ramp choreography: the tiger launches into a massive mid-air pounce as time slows dramatically — frost crystals and snow particles freeze in mid-air before snapping back to full speed as the impact shatters a floating glacier slab. **Camera:** Low gliding tracking shot across the floating ice surface before tilting upward to follow the tiger’s leap through drifting glacier fragments. **Style & Constraints:** Photorealistic fur simulation, ray-traced ice refraction, volumetric aurora lighting, cinematic cold atmosphere, 35mm film grain, 8K resolution.

prompts.text: Video prompt seedance 2.0 - 15s text to video The Storm Shepherd vs the Glass Locust King A cinematic weather war. A nomadic shepherd in layered sky-blue robes stands on a high desert ridge during a sandstorm. He fights using a hooked crook, wind channels, and charged storm clouds. His enemy is a king locust made of translucent chitin, lightning veins, and a swarm-crown of crystal insects. The setting transitions from dune ridge → storm trench → lightning plateau → salt crater. 0–3 seconds: the locust king descends out of the storm with a shrieking crown of glass-winged insects. The shepherd drives his crook into the sand and pulls a vortex of wind upward, forcing the first wave of insects into a spiraling wall. Close-ups of cracked lips, cloth snapping, glass wings, and charged dust. 3–7 seconds: the locust king splinters into swarming formations that attack from every direction across a trench carved by wind. The shepherd walks into the storm, redirecting gusts with broad arm sweeps. Each movement creates visible wind corridors that slam the swarm into rock spires. Sand peels off the ground in ribbons. Close-ups of sandals sliding, storm static along the crook, chitin fractures, and lightning flicker under skin. 7–10 seconds: the battle climbs onto a lightning plateau. The locust king towers above him with a giant fan of translucent wings reflecting the whole storm. The shepherd raises both hands and pulls a fork of lightning out of the sky like a rope, then whips it in a massive arc that shears off half the swarm crown. Orbit camera, desert lightning, flying crystal limbs. 10–12 seconds: rapid tracking shot as the shepherd runs across a collapsing salt shelf while the king reforms and dives with all wings screaming. He hooks the crook into its thorax and drags it downward into a charged crater. 12–15 seconds: overhead slow fall into the salt crater as storm winds spiral inward. The shepherd lands first while the locust king breaks apart into rain, glass fragments, and dead static that spiderwebs through the salt. Final frame: one intact locust wing ringing in the wind. Style: epic storm fantasy, desert electricity, glass insect textures, sand and lightning choreography, high-contrast sky warfare.

prompts.text: Tested Seedance 2.0 on Topview today and the output stopped me mid-scroll. Real human faces. Full cinematic quality. One prompt. Prompt used: “15-second First-Person Action Movie Short Film: 8 shots with extremely intense handheld POV. The protagonist rushes into a dim industrial warehouse with a pistol, shuttling at high speed between metal boxes and iron chains. Enemies suddenly appear from behind the shelves, firing rapidly at close range. The camera spins violently into a narrow corridor; the protagonist smashes the close-range enemy with the pistol butt, slides behind a forklift to reload. The glass office explodes, with sparks and debris flying everywhere. Finally, he kicks open the huge iron gate, rushes onto the roof at dusk, and fires at the last enemy in the distance, with a neon futuristic city in the background. The ending fades out with a chain explosion and the intense glow of the setting sun, featuring clean actions and sharp shots.” Business Annual users get 365 days of unlimited access with real human face support from day one. prompts.text: Blood Moon Approaches Eclipse Moon Vampire Princess Ultra-cool transformation transition effect, recreating popular short videos Seedance 2.0 All-in-One Reference Prompt Shot One: Everyday Home Scene Time Segment: 0:00 to 0:02 Shot Distance and Type: Medium shot, handheld follow-cam Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera subtly sways with the character's movements, with a light, upbeat, and lively rhythm. The camera follows the trajectory of the girl's arm waving, finally facing the prop she raises. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The girl is wearing white loungewear pajamas patterned with Crayon Shin-chan designs and a bear hairband. She holds a sheet of white paper rolled into the shape of a telescope. She first playfully waves this "paper telescope" with a smile on her face, then directly aims one end of the "paper telescope" at and fully presses it against the lens, using the physical darkness inside the paper tube to block the frame, creating a perfect transition medium. Visual Effects: No obvious effects, belonging to everyday real-light-and-shadow recording. Cleverly utilizes the dark circular hole inside the paper tube rolled into a telescope shape as a physical transition entry medium. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Warm white tones, bright. Mood is relaxed, everyday, and lively, laying the groundwork for the dramatic contrast to follow. Shot Two: Spacetime Tunnel Transition Time Segment: 0:02 to 0:04 Shot Distance and Type: Close-up transitioning to full wide shot, first-person perspective push-in Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera rapidly pushes forward at high speed, visually as if directly penetrating the inner hole of the "paper telescope" the girl pressed against the lens in the previous second, delivering an extremely strong visual impact and a sense of extreme speed. Main Subject Actions and Expression: No character subject, primarily showcasing the process of traversing space. Visual Effects: Intense CG visual effects, deep red vortex and wormhole effects with a strong sense of suction and spatial distortion, followed by bats flying out from the depths of the frame as visual guides. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Interwoven dark red and black. Mood shifts instantly from relaxed to mysterious, dangerous, and filled with a sense of the unknown. Shot Three: Vampire Princess Descends Time Segment: 0:04 to 0:06 Shot Distance and Type: Overhead full wide shot transitioning to medium shot, panning camera (downward pan) Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera pans from top to bottom, aligning with the character's upward gaze, with speed transitioning from fast to slow motion, creating tremendous visual tension. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The transformed vampire princess (white hair, elven ears, white ornate gown, red nails) gazes up at the lens from below, extending one hand toward the lens as if inviting or casting a spell, her expression alluring yet brimming with dangerous allure. Visual Effects: Strong slow-motion (high-frame-rate) treatment, with a large amount of red petals or light-spot particles drifting in the foreground, a red magical halo floating above the character's head, and a background of intersecting black Gothic tree branches and net-like structures. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Intense dark red blended with high-contrast cool white tones. Mood is mysterious, seductive, and infused with Gothic opulence. Shot Four: Alluring Freeze-Frame Time Segment: 0:06 to 0:09 Shot Distance and Type: Medium close-up, with a slight handheld push-pull feel Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera remains relatively fixed but with a breathing and subtle tremor sensation, syncing with the music's beat for a strong rhythmic pulse. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The character holds the extended-hand pose, lightly touching her lips with the other hand, her gaze locked directly on the lens, her expression radiating immense allure and oppressive intensity. Visual Effects: Incorporates frame-skipping, rapid flickers, subtle screen distortion (glitch-fault style), and radial blur effects, paired with high-frequency red light flashes to amplify visual impact and cyberpunk vibes. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Large areas of high-saturation red background, with the character at the absolute visual center. Mood is high-energy, intensely visually aggressive. Shot Five: Blood Moon Flight Time Segment: 0:09 to 0:12 Shot Distance and Type: Long shot, fixed camera Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera remains steady, with elements in the frame exhibiting a slow floating sensation. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The character unfurls massive demonic wings, hovering in the night sky in an expansive pose. Visual Effects: Grand scene compositing, with a massive blood moon in the background, rendered with dark red cloud layers; slow-motion flocks of bats accompany in flight, evoking a powerful epic atmosphere. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Dark fantasy tones dominated by black and red. Mood is grand, awe-inspiring, and brimming with dominance, perfectly echoing the video's theme.

Shot Two: Spacetime Tunnel Transition Time Segment: 0:02 to 0:04 Shot Distance and Type: Close-up transitioning to full wide shot, first-person perspective push-in Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera rapidly pushes forward at high speed, visually as if directly penetrating the inner hole of the "paper telescope" the girl pressed against the lens in the previous second, delivering an extremely strong visual impact and a sense of extreme speed. Main Subject Actions and Expression: No character subject, primarily showcasing the process of traversing space. Visual Effects: Intense CG visual effects, deep red vortex and wormhole effects with a strong sense of suction and spatial distortion, followed by bats flying out from the depths of the frame as visual guides. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Interwoven dark red and black. Mood shifts instantly from relaxed to mysterious, dangerous, and filled with a sense of the unknown.  
Shot Three: Vampire Princess Descends Time Segment: 0:04 to 0:06 Shot Distance and Type: Overhead full wide shot transitioning to medium shot, panning camera (downward pan) Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera pans from top to bottom, aligning with the character's upward gaze, with speed transitioning from fast to slow motion, creating tremendous visual tension. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The transformed vampire princess (white hair, elven ears, white ornate gown, red nails) gazes up at the lens from below, extending one hand toward the lens as if inviting or casting a spell, her expression alluring yet brimming with dangerous allure. Visual Effects: Strong slow-motion (high-frame-rate) treatment, with a large amount of red petals or light-spot particles drifting in the foreground, a red magical halo floating above the character's head, and a background of intersecting black Gothic tree branches and net-like structures. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Intense dark red blended with high-contrast cool white tones. Mood is mysterious, seductive, and infused with Gothic opulence.  
Shot Four: Alluring Freeze-Frame Time Segment: 0:06 to 0:09 Shot Distance and Type: Medium close-up, with a slight handheld push-pull feel Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera remains relatively fixed but with a breathing and subtle tremor sensation, syncing with the music's beat for a strong rhythmic pulse. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The character holds the extended-hand pose, lightly touching her lips with the other hand, her gaze locked directly on the lens, her expression radiating immense allure and oppressive intensity. Visual Effects: Incorporates frame-skipping, rapid flickers, subtle screen distortion (glitch-fault style), and radial blur effects, paired with high-frequency red light flashes to amplify visual impact and cyberpunk vibes. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Large areas of high-saturation red background, with the character at the absolute visual center. Mood is high-energy, intensely visually aggressive.  
Shot Five: Blood Moon Flight Time Segment: 0:09 to 0:12 Shot Distance and Type: Long shot, fixed camera Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera remains steady, with elements in the frame exhibiting a slow floating sensation. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The character unfurls massive demonic wings, hovering in the night sky in an expansive pose. Visual Effects: Grand scene compositing, with a massive blood moon in the background, rendered with dark red cloud layers; slow-motion flocks of bats accompany in flight, evoking a powerful epic atmosphere. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Dark fantasy tones dominated by black and red. Mood is grand, awe-inspiring, and brimming with dominance, perfectly echoing the video's theme.

prompts.text: Shot 2-1 (0s–5s) Medium shot, slow dolly in. A morning market in the fused city. Glowing plants grown by elves with magic stand alongside Earth's vegetables and fruits, and mithril trinkets forged by dwarves are arranged in wooden crates. An elf merchant with pointed ears exchanges goods with a smiling Earth human. A beastkin girl with animal ears and a tail curiously picks up an Earth fruit. Soft morning natural light, warm color temperature, cinematic, shallow depth of field. Narration (low, resonant male Japanese voice): "Elves brought magic, and dwarves brought technology." White Japanese subtitles at the bottom of the screen: "Elves brought magic, and dwarves brought technology." Shot 2-2 (5s–10s) Medium shot, slow horizontal pan. A street in the fused city. At the terrace seating of an Earth café, an elf woman shows a scroll inscribed with runes to an Earth student. In the background, a dwarf craftsman assembles a spirit-powered device alongside an Earth engineer. Street signs feature both Japanese and elvish script. Warm afternoon light, golden hour, warm color temperature, cinematic, film grain. Narration (low, resonant male Japanese voice): "Beastkin brought keen senses, and dwarves brought engineering. Each contribution reshaped everyday life." White Japanese subtitles at the bottom of the screen: "Beastkin brought keen senses, and dwarves brought engineering. Each contribution reshaped everyday life." Shot 2-3 (10s–15s) Wide shot, slow tilt up. A panoramic view of the fused city at dusk. Elven vines and dwarven gear decorations beautifully entwine the framework of Tokyo Tower, forming a magnificent hybrid structure. At the base in the plaza, Earth humans and elves run stalls together; in the sky, silhouettes of angel-like wings gracefully circle, while beastkin children race around with Earth children. Lighting blending sunset oranges with the pale blue glow of elven magic, a grand sense of scale, cinematic 4K, film grain. Narration (low, resonant male Japanese voice): "Where magic and science intertwine—a new world begins to turn." White Japanese subtitles at the bottom of the screen: "Where magic and science intertwine—a new world begins to turn."

prompts.text: The host! Prompt on Seedance 2 : A lone explorer with a headlamp enters a vast arctic ice cave, crystalline blue walls glittering in the narrow beam of light. Slow push-in follows through the cave entrance, each step crunching on frost, breath visible in the freezing air, the headlamp illuminating intricate ice formations that stretch into darkness. A deep rumble shakes loose ice from the ceiling. The camera shifts to urgent shaky handheld, swinging wildly as the explorer spins around, the headlamp catching glimpses of something massive moving in the shadows, sickly pale green bioluminescent veins pulsing along the cave walls. The perspective snaps to a wide static shot as the creature emerges fully, a towering insectoid horror covered in translucent ice-like chitin, green light pulsing from within its body, dwarfing the terrified explorer. Glacial blue ice environment, bioluminescent creature design, horror lighting. 16:9 cinematic.

prompts.tweet_text:
Here’s how to use Seedance 2.0 inside CapCut 
(Bookmark this. You’ll need it.)

Step 1. Open CapCut
Don’t start a normal project

Step 2. Find the AI tools
Tap “Expand” or “AI Creator Hub”

Step 3. Click “Text to Video”
This activates Seedance 2.0

Step 4. Write your prompt
Start with: “Create a video of…”

Bad:
“A man walking”

Good:
“A man in a black suit walking through a rainy city at night, neon lights, cinematic lighting, close-up shot”

Step 5. Generate
Wait 30–60 seconds
Your video is ready

Step 6. Upgrade your output
• Set quality to 1080p
• Choose aspect ratio (9:16 for TikTok)
• Adjust motion for realism

Step 7. Keep characters consistent
Repeat the exact description in every prompt

 Step 8. Iterate fast
Test multiple prompts
Best idea wins

Pro tip
Your results are only as good as your prompts

Save prompts that work. Reuse them. Scale faster.

If you’re serious about content in 2026…
This is a cheat code.

Watch this video for a step-by-step guide

prompts.text: PromptShare Cinematic Battle prompt for Seedance 2 made in @invideoOfficial PROMPT Character A highly trained female operative in a sleek black tactical suit, calm, focused, controlled breathing, sharp eyes scanning constantly. Dual pistols in hand, precise and efficient. 0-3s Camera starts inside a luxury bank. Slow push through a tense standoff—security guards aiming, civilians frozen. She stands in the center, perfectly still. 3-5s Without warning—everything explodes into motion. She steps forward. Rapid precise shots—each movement minimal, controlled, no wasted motion. 5-7s Camera locks close to her, orbiting as she moves through guards. She uses environment—pillars, desks—flowing movement, never stopping. 7-9s Transition through glass reflections. She slides across polished floor, firing mid-motion, bullets impacting surfaces around her. 9-11s Tight corridor sequence. Close-quarters engagement, ultra fast reactions, micro head turns, instant targeting. 11-13s Massive push forward into main hall. Camera pulls wide—chaos everywhere. She moves through it like it’s slowed down. 13-15s Final moment. She exits through shattered glass doors into daylight. Doesn’t look back. Behind her—delayed impacts, everything collapses. Camera freezes on her walking away. Continuous tracking shot, tight proximity + dynamic orbit + whip transitions masked by movement Luxury bank interior, marble, glass, reflections, daylight contrast Ultra realistic, hollywood heist action, john wick gun-fu, precise choreography, high tension, fluid motion, cinematic lighting, no distortion, no stretching

prompts.text: 2. Upload your Video reference to Seedance and reference the action in the prompt Specific animation references work best with short clips, such as movements lasting 2–3 seconds. In your prompt, try to specify clearly when the reference should be executed. You can use timestamps like "in the second 00:03" or "in the second 5 of the shot," or describe when the action happens using logical connectors: while, then, after that, before. Prompt Video 1: "Video1"= teleport appear VFX. "Video2"= teleport dissapear VFX Do a japanese fast paced cut high stylized figh scene. (0-2s) "Image1" first frame. Characters look at each other, prepare for fight and dissapear doing a "teleport dissapear VFX" with smear lines in the style of "Video2" (2s-5s): Camera starts with a wide shot of the environment, empty, and then character 1 suddenly appears doing a "teleport appear VFX" movement in the style of "Video1". He then he flights righ to the camera with his punch charged, typical sakuga figh shot where the camera shows his face extremely close to camera, and then focus in the punch (5s-6s) Wide shot of character one approaching charater 2 with his punch . He throws the punch but character 2 dodges it dissapearing with a "teleport dissapear VFX" movemente, in the style of "Video1" (6s-8s): shot in low angle showing character 1 first missing the punch and then character 2 appearing behind character one with a "teleport appear VFX" in the style of "Video1" and executing a kick with full force that imapcts in the head of character 2. (8s-10s) wide shot of character one thrown to the air at high speed, with lot of smear frames, movment directly aproaching the camera (10s-12s) wide shot, ccharacter 2 dissapears doing a "teleport dissapear VFX" movement in the style of "Video2" to go near the character thrown in the air (12s-15s) character 2 appears next to character one with a "teleport appear VFX" movement in the style of "Video1" while character one is in the air at high speed and then performa an extremly violent punch, while the camera does an extreme push in to the punch Prompt Video 2: "Image1" as first-frame composition and character placement reference. "Video1" as special high-speed movement reference. Create an 11-second anime action shot with two characters in the same environment. Keep character identity consistent throughout. Use the first reference for the opening composition. Use the second reference only for the high-speed movement behavior, afterimage trails, motion rhythm, and transformation logic. 0s-2s: Two characters stand facing each other and talk briefly.Match the framing and starting pose from "Image1". Stable shot, clear readability, calm before the attack. 2s-6s: Character 1 launches a special high-speed move. Use "Video1" as the movement reference. Character 1 moves at lightning speed, rapidly dashing back and forth across the screen. Create elongated afterimage streaks, intense motion blur, smear frames, and fast directional trails. The real body is almost impossible to track.T he movement should feel explosive, aggressive, and extremely fast. 6s-8s: Character 2 turns his head left and right, trying to follow the attack. He is tense and alert, scanning both sides of the screen. The afterimage streaks keep flashing around him at high speed. 8s-11s: Character 2 executes a decisive sword slash that intercepts one of the high-speed afterimage streaks. The strike cuts through the elongated moving mass effect and breaks the technique. At that moment, Character 1 is forced out of the special high-speed form from"Video1" .The afterimage collapses and reveals the real body of Character 1. Character 1 falls to the ground after being stopped mid-technique. Visual priorities: anime action, extreme speed readability, strong silhouette separation, clean character consistency, dramatic timing, crisp sword impact, controlled chaos, cinematic motion clarity.

Seedance 2.0 prompt Ultra-realistic cinematic disaster epic, single continuous shot, no cuts, no montage, no multiple-camera language, documentary-style realism, IMAX-scale clarity, natural film grain, high dynamic range, physically accurate daylight, realistic atmospheric perspective, authentic reflections, volumetric dust and smoke, true-to-life city lighting and environmental behavior. A real modern Chinese megacity in daytime: high-rise towers, elevated roads, broad avenues, plaza spaces, parked and moving cars, street signs, glass facades, all with the look of genuine live-action footage. The shot begins with chaos already underway: a colossal ancient giant python, far larger and more terrifying than a realistic anaconda, is violently rampaging through the city. Its thick muscular body whips between streets and buildings with horrifying speed and weight, crushing cars, smashing roadside structures, wrapping around building facades, lunging at fleeing crowds. People run in panic, vehicles collide, glass shards, concrete dust, torn billboards and debris fill the air. Everything feels like a real catastrophic emergency captured in one uninterrupted shot. Then the sky suddenly shifts. Clouds are torn apart at high speed and a gigantic Chinese dragon dives down from the heavens. This is not a cartoon dragon and has no wings. It is a believable colossal Eastern dragon, a mysterious real biological creature of the natural world, long serpentine body, no wings, powerful limbs, realistic muscles, bones, scale overlap, weathered reflective scales, layered shadows, natural skin tension, believable mass and inertia. As it moves, its body undulates through the air with convincing aerodynamic resistance, whiskers and mane trailing in turbulent airflow, subtle cloud vapor and disturbed mist forming around it. The dragon descends like a guardian over the city, precisely targeting the giant python below. In one continuous shot, the two beasts engage in a brutal close-range fight among skyscrapers and over shattered streets. The python coils, strikes, and thrashes between buildings; the Chinese dragon tears away constriction with its claws, coils around the serpent to overpower it, and finally bites hard into the python's upper body and neck. With overwhelming force, the dragon drags the struggling serpent up from the city ruins and lifts it into the sky. In the final moments, the wingless Chinese dragon powers upward by driving its long body through the air, carrying the still-writhing python away into the distant sky. Below, terrified citizens stop running and stare upward in stunned awe. The ruined city remains filled with smoke, debris, and sunlight cutting through haze, creating a final epic image of a divine dragon saving humanity. Keep the entire piece grounded in real-world physics, realistic destruction, believable scale, terrifying weight, restrained camera behavior, immersive live-action disaster authenticity, not stylized, not fantasy-cartoon, not game-like, absolutely photorealistic.

prompts.text: Create a 15-second cinematic sequence with strict continuity, no identity drift, no outfit mutation, and no face alteration. The pilot is a young East Asian woman with an oval face, soft straight eyebrows, large natural eyes, small nose, soft lips, clean natural skin texture, and long straight black hair with a center or slight side part. Her face must remain identical in all frames with no beautification or stylization. She wears a tight-fitting high-fashion floral mini dress in soft pastel colors with sheer long sleeves and an elegant luxurious feel, and this outfit must remain unchanged throughout the entire sequence. The environment is a destroyed modern city with collapsing skyscrapers, broken glass, debris, smoke columns, burning vehicles, and empty streets under a cold desaturated cinematic tone. The style is IMAX realism with a 2.39:1 widescreen frame, Panavision C-series 35mm lens, subtle film grain, and stable camera movement. Only pink and blue are saturated colors in the scene. A massive kaiju with asymmetrical wet armored skin and glowing blue veins destroys the city with heavy destructive motion. A giant feminine mecha with smooth elegant white armor, pastel pink highlights, and gold accents appears holding a glowing pink energy sword. Inside the cockpit, the pilot remains in the same floral dress with no transformation, with holographic controls floating around her hands. The sequence starts with kaiju destruction for 0–3 seconds, then a small girl POV showing fear at 4–6 seconds, followed by the mecha descending and performing one precise slow-motion sword strike at 7–10 seconds that slices the kaiju cleanly with a burst of blue blood. At 11–13 seconds the mecha lands heavily creating a dust shockwave and flicks blood off the sword, and at 13–15 seconds the camera zooms into the cockpit revealing the pilot clearly with the same face and outfit, showing intense focus with holographic controls reacting. Maintain strict realism, no deformation, no outfit change, no scale errors, and perfect continuity throughout. Step 5: Click Generate and wait for the result

prompts.text: Prompt on Seedance 2 : Epic wide-angle shot of a vast ancient battlefield at golden hour, thousands of warriors clashing with swords and shields under a hazy amber sky thick with smoke and ash. A lone archer in weathered bronze armor, face streaked with dirt, draws a longbow with deliberate tension. The arrow releases with a sharp twang. Camera immediately snaps behind the arrow, tracking it in extreme slow motion as it cuts through drifting smoke and falling embers. Shallow depth of field keeps the arrow razor-sharp while the chaotic battlefield blurs behind. The camera pushes closer, tighter, until the wooden shaft fills the frame — revealing intricate carved runes and weathered grain. Seamless transition to macro scale: the arrow's surface becomes a landscape. A microscopic civilization of tiny warriors the size of splinters wages war across the fletching. Miniature catapults hurl fragments of dust. Warriors scale the carved runes like canyon walls. Torches flicker. Banners wave. All rendered with Made on @runwayml

prompts.text: Seedance V2 15-second cinematic romance, slow-burn emotional tone, one man and one woman only, both adults in their mid-20s, western-style leads, casual luxury wardrobe, dark quiet apartment living room at night, refined romantic tension, natural lip sync, no subtitles, no text on screen. Character continuity: Female lead: adult western woman, mid-20s, elegant natural beauty, long brunette hair with soft loose waves, minimal makeup, emotionally guarded but faintly amused, seated on the sofa. Outfit: soft ivory off-shoulder knit sweater, dark straight-leg jeans, barefoot, understated jewelry. Male lead: adult western man, mid-20s, handsome refined features, slightly messy dark hair, thin metal-frame glasses, calm warm expression. Outfit: charcoal knit sweater over a white T-shirt, dark trousers, sleeves pushed once, relaxed but polished. Environment: Upscale apartment living room, soft sofa, low coffee table, one warm lamp, deep evening shadows, muted neutral palette, intimate silence, shallow depth of field, premium film texture, modern romantic realism. 0-3s: Wide-to-medium slow push-in. She sits in one corner of the sofa with arms folded, looking away. He crosses the room and sits on the edge of the coffee table facing her, leaving a small respectful distance. Hold the silence and tension. 3-6s: Medium close-up on the man. He studies her face, voice low, calm, almost smiling: “I tried very hard to have an ordinary evening.” 6-9s: Close-up on the woman. She turns her eyes to him at last, cool but intrigued, with the faintest teasing edge: “And how did that go?” 9-12s: Close-up on the man. He lets out a quiet breath, gaze steady. He reaches toward a loose strand near her cheek, stopping just before touching: “Poorly. You were in all of it.” 12-15s: Side two-shot. She lightly catches his wrist before he pulls away, not rejecting him, only holding him there. A small unwilling smile appears: “That is not helping me stay angry.” Hold on the shared gaze, the restrained smile, and the unresolved tenderness. Motion and style rules: Slow elegant camera movement, meaningful pauses, micro-expressions, lingering eye contact, almost-touch tension, realistic hand motion, restrained acting, no kneeling, no raised voices, no crying, no extra characters, no exaggerated gestures, no waxy skin, no stiff posing, premium romantic realism, emotionally charged final frame.

Suddenly, the ground shakes, and a colossal, 30-foot demonic titan with multiple red eyes and jagged armor emerges from the darkness, letting out a silent, earth-shaking roar. The user raises their left hand, charging a massive violet aura." [00:10 - 00:15] SEGMENT 3: The Final Surge (The Climax) "Extreme POV close-up. The user's hand reaches toward the giant titan. A colossal spectral shadow-giant manifests behind the camera, mimicking the user's movement. All the shadow energy in the room condenses into the user's palm. The user fires a massive beam of pure abyssal purple energy that pierces through the titan's chest. The titan slowly disintegrates into black ash and embers, its red eyes fading as it collapses. The screen shakes with a heavy bass effect as the purple veins on the user's arm glow one last time before fading to black." Cinematic gender transformation sequence: start with a male figure in a dark, mysterious environment, subtle seductive tension in body language. Begin slow transformation with close-ups on physical change: jawline softens, shoulders narrow, hips subtly shift, hair lengthens and flows. Use dramatic lighting and dynamic camera movement, soft glowing particles, smooth skin morphing, luminous eyes, halo effects, ethereal atmosphere. Add seductive emotional nuance without explicit content — lingering gaze, graceful posture, fluid silhouette, magnetic presence. Sequence seamless and cinematic, slow motion transformation blending male to female form, film-like color grading, atmospheric shadows and highlights, polished visual flow, intense but elegant aesthetic. A cinematic, hyper-realistic vertical shot of a male-to-female shapeshifter transformation in a dimly lit luxurious room. The left half of the body remains rugged and masculine, while the right half is transforming into a graceful, elegant female form. Skin ripples like liquid silk at the intersection, and clothing morphs seamlessly from a masculine jacket into flowing attire. Dramatic low-key lighting emphasizes contours, intricate textures, and the surreal transformation. Dynamic expression of surprise and awe. High contrast, 8k resolution. prompts.text: Setting: Dark fortress interior with towering metal structures. Teal/cyan illumination leaks through gaps between massive pillars. Metallic reflective floor. Character: White-haired girl with red eyes. Mechanical angel in white armor plating. Wings on her back emit blue energy. [1: HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT WITH BOOST TRAILS] Extreme top-down angle. A tiny white light point zigzags across the fortress trailing blue energy lines. Concentric sonic-boom rings expand at each turning point. Wind-pressure particles scatter off the metal floor below. [2: CHARACTER CLOSE-UP → WEAPON AIM → FIRE → EXTREME FACE CLOSE-UP] Hard cut to low-angle close-up — the angel with wings spread, energy blades aimed forward in firing stance. She fires. Then the camera begins an agonizingly slow, deliberate zoom toward her face. It continues until only her glowing red eyes fill the entire frame. Pure intimidation. [3: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → ENERGY MAX → BOOST] From the red-eye extreme close-up, blue energy vents intensify in stages — blue → bright white. The entire screen whites out. An explosive flash of energy release. [4: HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT WITH BOOST TRAILS] Immediately after whiteout she streaks across the fortress at extreme speed. Blue beam trails cut diagonally across the frame. A targeting reticle flickers for an instant. [5: KICK TOWARD CAMERA] She dives from above and drives a kick straight at the camera — extreme low-angle POV from the target's perspective. Her armored leg fills the frame. Wing jets fire for added impact. [6: SAME KICK FROM DIFFERENT ANGLE → EXPLOSION] The same kick replayed from a different camera angle. On contact: cyan/white explosion → thick energy dust cloud → the dust lights up from inside as a secondary blast erupts. [7: CLOSE-UP → WEAPON AIM → AUTO-TARGETING → FULL BARRAGE] Dust clears to reveal the angel with all wings fully deployed. Each blue energy blade independently auto-adjusts its aim — blue/purple electrical arcs crackle as targeting locks on. Then every blade fires at once — continuous rapid-fire barrage, the entire screen consumed by cyan/white explosions. [8: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → MAX BOOST → HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT] Energy vents charge up again in stages. Blue → white → whiteout → explosive jet blast. She rockets away trailing blue energy across the fortress. [9: WEAPON READY POSE] Against the teal fortress backdrop she holds a static pose, energy blades aimed forward, wings fully spread. A faint blue aura shimmers around her.

prompt:
Setting: Dark fortress interior with towering metal structures. Teal/cyan illumination leaks through gaps between massive pillars. Metallic reflective floor.

Character: White-haired girl with red eyes. Mechanical angel in white armor plating. Wings on her back emit blue energy.

[1: HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT WITH BOOST TRAILS]

Extreme top-down angle. A tiny white light point zigzags across the fortress trailing blue energy lines. Concentric sonic-boom rings expand at each turning point. Wind-pressure particles scatter off the metal floor below.

[2: CHARACTER CLOSE-UP → WEAPON AIM → FIRE → EXTREME FACE CLOSE-UP]

Hard cut to low-angle close-up — the angel with wings spread, energy blades aimed forward in firing stance. She fires. Then the camera begins an agonizingly slow, deliberate zoom toward her face. It continues until only her glowing red eyes fill the entire frame. Pure intimidation.

[3: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → ENERGY MAX → BOOST]

From the red-eye extreme close-up, blue energy vents intensify in stages — blue → bright white. The entire screen whites out. An explosive flash of energy release.

[4: HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT WITH BOOST TRAILS]

Immediately after whiteout she streaks across the fortress at extreme speed. Blue beam trails cut diagonally across the frame. A targeting reticle flickers for an instant.

[5: KICK TOWARD CAMERA]

She dives from above and drives a kick straight at the camera — extreme low-angle POV from the target's perspective. Her armored leg fills the frame. Wing jets fire for added impact.

[6: SAME KICK FROM DIFFERENT ANGLE → EXPLOSION]

The same kick replayed from a different camera angle. On contact: cyan/white explosion → thick energy dust cloud → the dust lights up from inside as a secondary blast erupts.

[7: CLOSE-UP → WEAPON AIM → AUTO-TARGETING → FULL BARRAGE]

Dust clears to reveal the angel with all wings fully deployed. Each blue energy blade independently auto-adjusts its aim — blue/purple electrical arcs crackle as targeting locks on. Then every blade fires at once — continuous rapid-fire barrage, the entire screen consumed by cyan/white explosions.

[8: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → MAX BOOST → HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT]

Energy vents charge up again in stages. Blue → white → whiteout → explosive jet blast. She rockets away trailing blue energy across the fortress.

[9: WEAPON READY POSE]

Against the teal fortress backdrop she holds a static pose, energy blades aimed forward, wings fully spread. A faint blue aura shimmers around her.

prompts.text: Core Concept: A continuous free-fall illusion where an iPhone 17 Pro Max "drops" facing upwards, and the character leaps after it. As they fall together, rapid match-cut background and wardrobe changes simulate passing through multiple dimensions. THE "UNREACHABLE" RULE: During the entire flight sequence (Scenes 2-5), the woman is strictly unable to catch the iPhone. She must be reaching out desperately with empty hands, but the camera (the phone) remains just inches out of her grasp, maintaining the tension of the chase. CRITICAL CAMERA ANGLE & PROP RULE: The falling scenes MUST be shot from an extreme low-angle / worm's-eye view. The camera lens IS the falling iPhone. Therefore, the woman’s hands must be completely EMPTY during the fall. Do NOT show her holding the phone. Universal Rule: A young woman with red hair must appear in all scenes for perfect visual continuity. Strictly use "The same Character" lock. Total Duration: 10.0 seconds. Timeline & Scene-by-Scene Breakdown: Scene 1: The Pigeon & The Vault (00:00 - 00:01.5 | Duration: 1.5 sec) Location: High-end hotel balcony, sunny day. Action: The same Character (casual chic attire, red hair loose) is leaning on the balcony railing, holding her iPhone 17 Pro Max. A pigeon flies aggressively close to her face. Startled, she drops the phone. Camera Sequence: 1. Medium shot of the drop. 2. Tracking the phone tumbling (showing back glass and screen clearly). 3. Close-up of her shock. 4. She vaults the railing like a parkour athlete, diving after it. Scene 2: The City Fall (00:01.5 - 00:03.0 | Duration: 1.5 sec) Location: Sunny blue sky/glass skyscrapers. Camera Angle: Worm's-eye view, looking UP at her. Action: The same Character is freefalling toward the camera. She reaches down with EMPTY hands, but the phone/camera stays just out of reach. Wind blows her red hair upward. Transition: Hard match-cut. Scene 3: The Ocean Dive (00:03.0 - 00:04.5 | Duration: 1.5 sec) Location: Underwater environment. Action: Maintaining the same pose. Hands reaching but failing to grab the camera. Tiny bubbles rush upward past her. Wardrobe Change: Sleek, high-tech WHITE aquatic wetsuit. Transition: Hard match-cut. Scene 4: The Neon Night Fall (00:04.5 - 00:06.0 | Duration: 1.5 sec) Location: Neon-lit cyberpunk city. Action: Continuous downward reach with EMPTY hands. The phone remains uncaptured. Wardrobe Change: Glowing neon streetwear. Transition: Hard match-cut. Scene 5: The Deep Space Fall (00:06.0 - 00:07.5 | Duration: 1.5 sec) Location: Infinite starfield/nebula. Action: Slow-motion zero-gravity hair float. She is still reaching, hands open and EMPTY, unable to close her grip on the camera. Wardrobe Change: Sleek, PINK metallic spacesuit. Transition: Hard match-cut. Scene 6: The Gravity Snap & Catch (00:07.5 - 00:10.0 | Duration: 2.5 sec) Location: Luxurious indoor lounge. Action: The background changes to an ornate ceiling. The same Character is now lying on her back on a velvet sofa. Her "skydive" reach finally succeeds—she firmly catches the iPhone 17 Pro Max just inches from her face. Wardrobe Change: High-fashion evening dress. The Finale: She looks into the lens, gives a confident smile, playfully blows a stray lock of red hair, and the video cuts to black. Don't forget to attach your own photo and tweak the appearance description in the prompt. #YouArt #Seedance2

THE "UNREACHABLE" RULE: During the entire flight sequence (Scenes 2-5), the woman is strictly unable to catch the iPhone. She must be reaching out desperately with empty hands, but the camera (the phone) remains just inches out of her grasp, maintaining the tension of the chase.  

CRITICAL CAMERA ANGLE & PROP RULE: The falling scenes MUST be shot from an extreme low-angle / worm's-eye view. The camera lens IS the falling iPhone. Therefore, the woman’s hands must be completely EMPTY during the fall. Do NOT show her holding the phone.  

Universal Rule: A young woman with red hair must appear in all scenes for perfect visual continuity. Strictly use "The same Character" lock.  
Total Duration: 10.0 seconds.

Scene 1: The Pigeon & The Vault (00:00 - 00:01.5 | Duration: 1.5 sec)  
Location: High-end hotel balcony, sunny day.  
Action: The same Character (casual chic attire, red hair loose) is leaning on the balcony railing, holding her iPhone 17 Pro Max. A pigeon flies aggressively close to her face. Startled, she drops the phone.  

Camera Sequence: 
1. Medium shot of the drop. 
2. Tracking the phone tumbling (showing back glass and screen clearly). 
3. Close-up of her shock. 
4. She vaults the railing like a parkour athlete, diving after it.

Location: Sunny blue sky/glass skyscrapers.  
Camera Angle: Worm's-eye view, looking UP at her.  
Action: The same Character is freefalling toward the camera. She reaches down with EMPTY hands, but the phone/camera stays just out of reach. Wind blows her red hair upward.  Transition: Hard match-cut.  

Scene 3: The Ocean Dive (00:03.0 - 00:04.5 | Duration: 1.5 sec)  Location: Underwater environment.  
Action: Maintaining the same pose. Hands reaching but failing to grab the camera. Tiny bubbles rush upward past her.  
Wardrobe Change: Sleek, high-tech WHITE aquatic wetsuit.  Transition: Hard match-cut.  

Scene 4: The Neon Night Fall (00:04.5 - 00:06.0 | Duration: 1.5 sec)  
Location: Neon-lit cyberpunk city.

Wardrobe Change: Glowing neon streetwear.  
Transition: Hard match-cut.  

Scene 5: The Deep Space Fall (00:06.0 - 00:07.5 | Duration: 1.5 sec)  
Location: Infinite starfield/nebula.

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 prompt share: NASA APOLLO SPACESUIT A7L "WORN ON ANOTHER WORLD" DNA: July 20, 1969. 102 hours, 45 minutes, 40 seconds into the mission. One small step. Arri Alexa 65. Ultra-wide. Grain progressive — starts clinical-clean, ends at maximum as the lunar surface appears. Key light: cold fluorescent Mission Control white. Secondary: harsh unfiltered solar light — no atmosphere to diffuse it. Flares: none in the lab sequence. One single overwhelming flare as the visor catches unfiltered sunlight on the lunar surface. Background: white clean room → vacuum of space → lunar surface at Tranquility Base. 00:00–00:02 · THE LAYERS A single thread of nylon being measured under a magnifying glass by a white-gloved technician's hand. Then: cut to the 21 layers of the A7L suit being assembled simultaneously — each layer materializing and wrapping the suit form: the liquid cooling garment first, its tubes threading through the fabric like a vascular system. Then the pressure bladder. Then the restraint layer. Then the thermal micrometeorite garment. Each layer distinct, each critical. Camera cross-section view through all 21 layers simultaneously. 00:02–00:04.5 · THE HELMET Speed 30%. The polycarbonate helmet shell forms — perfectly spherical, flawless. The visor assembly drops in: the gold-coated visor — 24-karat gold, 0.0002 inches thick — pressing over the outer shell. Camera macro on the gold surface: it reflects everything in warm gold — including us. The neck ring locks with a quarter-turn — the mechanism designed to never, under any circumstances, fail. 00:04.5–00:07 · PRESSURIZATION Speed 8%. The most important moment. Air flowing into the suit — the pressure building to 3.75 psi. Camera inside the suit as it pressurizes: the fabric stiffening, the gloves expanding slightly. Every seal tested by the pressure itself. The suit becomes a world — a personal atmosphere, the only thing between a human being and the void. 00:07–00:10 · THE CLEAN ROOM Speed 15%. The suited figure — complete — standing in the white clean room under brutal fluorescent light. Technicians moving around it in blurred background. The suit reads in extraordinary detail: the layers visible at the seams, the connector ports, the PLSS backpack life support system mounting points. A visor drops over the helmet. The astronaut disappears inside. 00:10–00:13 · TRANQUILITY BASE Speed 3%. The surface of the Moon. The suit boot pressing into lunar regolith in ultra-slow motion — the print forming in dust that has not been disturbed in 4.5 billion years. Camera at surface level — the boot print in sharp focus, the horizon of the Moon in the background, the Earth hanging above it, the size of a marble. The suit in the background, the gold visor catching unfiltered solar light. The single most overwhelming flare of any film in this collection — total, white, sacred. 00:13–00:14.5 · THE REVEAL Speed 1% — absolute stillness. The A7L floating in the void — the Earth behind it at distance. The gold visor reflects the Earth. The Earth reflected in the suit designed to walk on the Moon. Everything is contained in this one reflection. 00:14.5–00:15 · END CARD Silence — total. Then a single radio crackle. NASA worm logo. "Worn once. Changed everything." No grain — this moment is too clear, too real. Hold. Fade.

prompts.text: Prompt for Seedance 2.0: CHARACTERS: Define one figure in a Japanese festival mask with a staff at the curb, recoiling pedestrians at the sidewalk edge, and a colossal serpentine abyssal titan with a ridge-backed silhouette and city-scale mass that rises after the second strike. STAGE: Set Shibuya Crossing at night after rain with LED billboards, reflective asphalt, moving traffic, and clear geography before the street turns to liquid, keeps swallowing traffic, and opens beneath the masked figure. EMOTIONAL TARGET: Build from dread into epic ascent. COLOR LOGIC: Neon Noir TIMELINE: 00:00.0: Open on a high wide over the curb lanes at Shibuya Crossing. Hold the figure in a Japanese festival mask still against the crowd blur. SFX: crossing beeps, shoe chatter. 00:01.2: Hard cut to a 50mm dolly push on the Japanese mask. Let billboard light crawl across its lacquered surface. SFX: city wash narrows. 00:02.4: Insert cut to the right hand striking the asphalt with the staff for the first hit. Show the impact point clearly. SFX: wood crack, low hum. 00:03.6: Match cut to a ripple blasting through reflected neon on the road surface. Keep the ring centered and fast. SFX: sub-bass pulse. 00:04.8: Smash cut to a 28mm low wide. Let the asphalt soften and turn viscous around the first impact point before the liquid begins to spread. SFX: tar tear, liquid surge. 00:06.0: Hard cut to a front three-quarter wide as Shibuya lane paint slowly sags under the creeping surface. Drive the liquid outward in a heavy crawl. SFX: bubbling drain, horn choke. 00:07.2: Hard cut to moving cars starting to drop nose-first and sink mid-motion as the softened street finally gives way under them. Hold the delayed weight shift long enough to read it. SFX: horn choke, metal groan, glass rattle. 00:08.4: Hard cut wider as pedestrians recoil along the sidewalk edge and more moving cars keep dropping into the black surface behind them. prompts.text: A woman in her mid-30s with dark braided hair entwined with living vines, wearing layered organic armor of bark and woven leaves, skin traced with glowing emerald root veins — opening frame is a medium close-up of her standing barefoot in the center of an abandoned concrete megacity plaza, completely still as small plants begin sprouting through cracks in the pavement. At second two she presses both palms downward — roots explode outward beneath the ground, instantly splitting asphalt and concrete as vegetation accelerates beyond natural growth speed. The city becomes a living organism: trees burst through buildings mid-rise, vines consume steel beams, and entire structures collapse under rapid organic expansion. She moves minimally — each gesture redirects the growth patterns: right hand sends explosive root pillars upward, left hand spreads creeping vine networks that engulf entire streets. Camera orbits tightly as green growth overtakes grey infrastructure, snap zooming into root eruptions and cutting to building collapses. Color logic: vivid bioluminescent green dominates new growth, contrasting against cold desaturated urban decay. Escalation builds as entire blocks are overtaken — skyscrapers crack and fall under root pressure. Final beat: hard POV shift — camera becomes the root network surging underground, racing through soil and concrete before bursting upward beneath a final collapsing tower. Particle detail on soil displacement, bark texture, and debris fragmentation; diegetic green glow illuminates dust clouds. Epic nature-reclaiming urban collapse, cinematic organic physics, 4K ultra-detail. Made in @dreamina_ai #DreaminaCPP #DreaminaAI

prompts.text: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white blouse, a flowing burgundy skirt, and white sneakers, stands on the edge of a high rooftop at night, looking out over a glowing modern city. A shadowy figure suddenly rushes in from behind and violently pushes her off the edge. Her expression turns from confusion to shock as she begins to fall. The camera follows her in a dramatic wide-angle frontal tracking shot as she drops between towering neon skyscrapers, with intense motion blur, spinning perspective, and cinematic speed. As she keeps falling, the real city seamlessly transforms into a surreal dreamlike dimension: a tunnel of colossal stone faces and metallic sculptures, floating cathedrals and shattered monuments in the clouds, giant marble statues, swirling red fabric, a deep blue vortex of water and feathers, enormous carnival masks and theatrical faces, abstract glowing ribbons and floating orbs, and a mystical geometric tunnel made of glowing runes, sigils, and burning celestial spheres. prompts.text: Shot on ALEXA 65mm anamorphic lens. Photorealistic cinematic quality. Aspect ratio 2.39:1 widescreen. Teal shadows, warm amber highlights. Film grain. Rain-soaked New York street at night. Neon signs, streetlights reflecting on wet asphalt. Steam rising from manholes. Lens flares, motion blur. Dolby Vision HDR. 0.0s–2.5s: Extreme low-angle tracking shot — a lone female fighter strides down a narrow NYC street, rain pouring heavily. Leather jacket soaked, hair slicked back and dripping. Heels echo faintly on wet pavement. Camera tracks backward with subtle shake. Yellow taxi lights streak across puddles. Figures step out from alleyways and fire escapes, slowly surrounding her. She tilts her head, cracks her knuckles — calm, fearless expression. 2.6s–5.0s: Whip-pan — first attacker lunges. TIME REMAP: slow-motion as she pivots smoothly, dodging and delivering a sharp elbow strike. Water sprays on impact. Her jacket snaps with the motion. Another attacker crashes into a stack of trash bags and metal bins. Sparks flicker from a flickering streetlight overhead. 5.1s–7.5s: Drone shot — overhead view as she moves fluidly through multiple opponents. SLOW MOTION: precise kicks and spins land cleanly, bodies sliding across rain-slick asphalt. Steam swirls under golden streetlights. One attacker swings a bat — she catches it mid-swing, twists, and disarms them effortlessly. 7.6s–10.0s: 360° orbital shot — she leaps into a spinning kick, taking down two attackers at once. Camera circles her as another rushes from behind. Without turning, she blocks and counters instantly. Breath visible in the cold night air. Each strike hits in sync with a rising cinematic score. 10.1s–13.0s: First-person POV — the final opponent charges. SMASH CUT: rapid, close-range exchange in slow motion. Her final punch lands clean. Silence falls. Rain continues to pour. Slow push-in — she stands alone in the empty street, adjusts her jacket sleeve, exhales steadily. Low-angle shot. Eyes locked forward. Unshaken.

prompts.text: INFINITE FALL — Beer Catch [image1] Guy: lean young man, wavy blonde hair, thin glasses, black short-sleeve open shirt, dark grey pinstripe wide-leg trousers, large silver belt buckle, brown leather loafers, arm tattoos, silver bracelets. Expression: not panicked — annoyed at the bottle, nothing more. IMAX 65mm aggressive handheld — camera itself in freefall with him, shaking slightly with air resistance, never still. Fast orbital cuts, whip pans between angles, camera sometimes rushing past him at speed. Everything blown violently upward: hair, jacket, trouser legs, shirt — continuous strong upward wind throughout. The visual grammar of terminal velocity. Sound FX: constant roaring wind, fabric snapping, bottle tumbling, liquid sloshing. Environment: pure white infinite void — no ground, no ceiling, no horizon. Just white in all directions. A brown glass beer bottle tumbling slowly in freefall beside him, liquid sloshing inside, just out of reach. negative: no ground, no slow camera, no calm floating — this is a violent fall The entire sequence is one continuous fall at full speed. Camera whips around him — bug's eye from directly below looking up at him shrinking then rushing toward camera, overhead looking straight down at him, 10mm close pass inches from his face with the wind tearing at his hair and glasses, Dutch angle tracking his full body as he reaches. The bottle tumbles just past his fingers — he repositions fast, body rotating in the fall, reaching again. His glasses nearly torn off by the wind, he pushes them back with one hand without stopping reaching with the other. The fall feels violent and fast — not peaceful zero gravity, not serene floating. The roaring wind is constant and loud. His clothes are being destroyed by the air resistance — shirt billowing completely open, trouser legs flattened against his legs then snapping outward. He finally grabs the bottle in one hard grip — fingers closing around the neck. He pulls it against the wind to his lips. Takes a long defiant sip. Wind still roaring. Hair still destroyed. Glasses still crooked. Camera does one final fast orbit around him — close, aggressive, whipping past. He lowers the bottle. Looks directly into the camera lens from centimeters away. Completely unbothered. Wind roar continues. Cut to black. IMAX/anamorphic, violent freefall camera, aggressive orbital handheld, constant roaring wind, infinite white void, 4K Music: Flex It - MPH, y3kfae
