prompts.text: FORMAT: 15s / 148 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D action-comedy / Pixar-Kung Fu Hustle homage SUBJECTS: Young man, torn t-shirt. Girlfriend, floral dress. Boss, black suit. Blockers: Landlady in nightgown, Tailor, Mahjong duo, Coolie porter, Landlord in pajamas. Pixar-proportioned: rubbery limbs, wire-fu physics. PROPS: Rainbow lollipop, silver hatchet, red slipper, cigarette, brass forearm rings, mahjong tiles, wooden pole. ENVIRONMENT: 1930s walled tenement block: dusty courtyard, tight corridors, cascading balconies. Laundry lines, hanging signs. Dusty golden light. MOOD: Wire-fu comedic mayhem. Impossible physics, deadpan reactions. COLOR LOGIC: Golden Hour Look CAMERA: One uninterrupted Steadicam event. Tracks the young man continuously, pulling back as he runs, swinging to frame each blocker without cutting. 24mm spherical lens. SCENE: 1. Steadicam starts MCU. Young man hands girlfriend the lollipop. 2. Boss steps in raising the hatchet. Young man leaps ten feet backward. Camera pulls back fast into the alley to lead his sprint. 3. Landlady steps in, swinging a red slipper in a blurry tornado of strikes. Young man slides under the swings on both knees. The wind force of her slaps blasts the Boss backward. 4. Camera tracks backward into a corridor. Tailor blocks, brass rings clinking. Young man deflects rapid punches, spinning the Tailor into a pillar as camera glides past. 5. Mahjong duo attacks with synchronized rapid-fire palm strikes. Young man parries both simultaneously using the back of his hands, then does a wire-fu backflip twenty feet up. Camera tilts up as they crash into their tile table. 6. Camera levels on a balcony. Coolie thrusts a wooden pole like a spear. Slow motion: Young man deflects the tip with a single knuckle. Normal speed: he spins the pole away, plants it, and pole-vaults over the roof. 7. Camera tracks him landing on a vertical brick wall. Three thugs launch flying kicks. Young man runs horizontally along the wall, blocking their kicks with rapid shin-blocks in mid-air. 8. Camera drops to floor level. Boss charges, swinging a wild hatchet combo. Young man side-steps, traps the wrist, steps directly onto the falling blade, and leaps off the Boss's head. 9. Camera pulls back through the gate. Landlord attacks with heavy tai-chi pushes. Young man engages in a lightning-fast sticky-hands exchange, redirecting the Landlord's momentum to spin him away before running past. 10. Camera stops EWS on open street. Boss and thugs crash into the Landlady in a dust cloud. Girlfriend waves the lollipop from a window. He waves back, running away. SFX: Acoustic guitar opens. Slipper slaps beat 3, brass clink 4, rapid palm smacks and tile crash 5, slow-mo whoosh and wood clack 6, fast wall steps and kick thuds 7, metallic ping 8, heavy clothing swoosh 9, massive dust boom 10 with guitar reprise.

prompts.text: cinematic horror. Jakarta KRL Commuter Line station at night, Sudirman station platform, harsh yellow-white fluorescent overhead lighting, worn dirty tiled floor, blue KRL train car parked at platform, Indonesian signage on walls. A young woman in [reference outfit] poses next to the train car taking a selfie, smiling. On the train wall behind her, a large advertisement poster shows a beautiful woman's face. The poster surface begins to ripple and crack. Long black wet hair pushes through the glossy paper. A pale hand with black fingernails tears through. A kuntilanak in torn white kebaya crawls out of the poster completely, feet never touching the ground, long hair covering her face, head tilted at an unnatural angle. Bystanders on the platform scream and scatter. The woman drops her phone and runs. POV handheld tracking shot, she sprints through the platform, quick glance back, the kuntilanak glides at impossible speed closing the distance, hair flowing, white kebaya tattered. Emergency lights flicker red. Train doors slam shut. Dead end. Wide shot the woman presses her back against the closed train doors, nowhere to go. The kuntilanak stops. Slowly raises her head. Two hollow black eyes beneath the hair. Shaky handheld cam, motion blur, high contrast shadows, horror aesthetic, cinematic.

prompts.text: Spent 24 hours stress-testing Seedance 2.0 so that you don't have to The difference between “AI slop” and “this looks directed” is literally 2–3 prompt changes. Seedance 2 Global access api :- https:// github.com/Anil-matcha/Se edance-2.0-API ... https:// muapi.ai/playground/see dance-v2.0-i2v ... If you are just looking for an app to run Seedance 2 without business email and geo restrictions check out VadooAI The “4-Part Prompt Formula” Most people write vibes. Seedance wants structure. Use this every time: Subject → Action → Camera → Style If you skip camera → you get random motion If you skip action → you get stiff clips 2. The “Camera is King” rule Seedance is basically a camera simulator. Instead of: “girl walking in city” Say: “tracking shot, slow dolly-in, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field” That alone upgrades output quality massively 3. The “Don’t Describe the Image” hack If you’re using a reference image: DO NOT re-describe it Only describe motion + changes Otherwise the model “reinterprets” your image and ruins it 4. The “Motion Intensity” trick Seedance doesn’t infer speed. “car drives” = boring “car accelerates aggressively, motion blur, tires screeching” = cinematic You have to explicitly define energy levels

The “4-Part Prompt Formula” 

Most people write vibes. Seedance wants structure.

Use this every time:

Subject → Action → Camera → Style

If you skip camera → you get random motion

If you skip action → you get stiff clips

2. The “Camera is King” rule 

Seedance is basically a camera simulator.

Instead of: “girl walking in city”

Say: “tracking shot, slow dolly-in, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field”

That alone upgrades output quality massively

3. The “Don’t Describe the Image” hack 

If you’re using a reference image:

DO NOT re-describe it

Only describe motion + changes

Otherwise the model “reinterprets” your image and ruins it

4. The “Motion Intensity” trick 

Seedance doesn’t infer speed.

“car drives” = boring

“car accelerates aggressively, motion blur, tires screeching” = cinematic

You have to explicitly define energy levels

prompts.text: WWE John Cena Vs Roman Reigns Made on seedance 2.0 Creation in @vadooai Prompt inspired by @techhalla [CINEMATIC SETUP] Style: Professional 4K TV Sports Broadcast footage, handheld ringside camera mixed with wide crane shots. Lens/Aperture: 35mm broadcast lens, deep depth of field to keep the crowd in view. Color Grade: High-contrast, saturated "Main Event" lighting with vibrant blues and reds. Atmosphere: Volumetric haze, strobe light flashes from the crowd, realistic arena sweat and skin texture. Audio: Immersive spatial sound, roaring stadium crowd, thudding ring canvas impacts, heavy metallic chair "clang" SFX. [CHARACTERS] Wrestler 1: Athletic, lean high-flyer in neon green trunks and wristbands. Wrestler 2: Heavyweight powerhouse, tall with long wet hair, wearing black leather tights. The Behemoth: A colossal, morbidly obese giant in a stretched leopard-print singlet.The Official: Standard referee in a black-and-white striped shirt and black slacks. [TIMELINE SECOND BY SECOND] 0-3s: [Medium Tracking Shot] Wrestler 1 sprints toward the ring ropes, bounces off the tensioned cables with realistic physics, and accelerates back toward the center. 3-6s: [Dynamic Low-Angle] Wrestler 2 stands his ground and executes a massive lariat clothesline; Wrestler 1 flips backward from the impact and hits the canvas hard with a visible ripple effect on the ring floor. 6-11s: [Wide Crane Shot] Both wrestlers lie dazed. A massive 500lb Behemoth climbs the turnbuckle. He pauses, then performs a giant splash, landing body-first onto both men. The ring frame shakes violently upon impact. 11-15s: [Tight Close-up] The referee suddenly grabs a cold-rolled steel chair. In a shocking heel-turn, he swings the chair overhead, smashing it against the Behemoth’s skull. Metallic impact sparks and "CLANG" spatial audio. [STYLE & QUALITY BOOSTERS] Photorealistic 8K, ultra-detailed skin textures and sweat, cinematic stadium lighting, perfect motion blur, high dynamic range, no artifacts, coherent multi-subject physics.

prompts.text: If George Lucas saw this video, he wouldn't have waited until 1999 to shoot Star Wars Episode 1—he'd have waited until 2026. First off, our site @openart_ai . In short, you open the site and select Seedance 2. There's just a little trick when entering the prompt. You need to present all 3 waves in a completely clear way: 1. scene: who, where, what they're doing 2. camera: close-up, tracking shot, slow motion 3. lighting: golden hour, neon, dramatic shadow Once you give it this trio, the model handles the rest. The more details you provide, the higher the output quality. But you absolutely have to give details in all three of these areas.

prompts.text: A massive coastal battlefield where ocean, land, and sky collide. Three colossal creatures engage: — a sky dragon with metallic scales and storm wings — a fire colossus emerging from volcanic fissures — a giant ocean leviathan rising from the sea Opening frame: wide shot of coastline — ocean churning, volcano erupting, storm clouds gathering overhead. Hook at second two: all three creatures attack simultaneously. The battlefield fractures into elemental chaos: — the dragon generates hurricane-force winds and lightning — the fire colossus erupts lava and shockwaves — the leviathan summons massive tidal surges The city between them collapses under combined forces — water floods streets, fire ignites structures, wind tears apart buildings. Camera sweeps between the three titans, snap zooming into collisions — fire meeting water in explosive steam clouds, lightning striking molten terrain. Color logic: deep ocean blue, molten orange-red, storm gray and electric white. Escalation builds as all three forces collide at the same point, destabilizing the entire coastline. Final beat: hard POV shift — camera becomes the wave-fire-storm collision itself, rushing forward as all elements merge into a single catastrophic blast. Massive environmental destruction, multi-element physics interaction, cinematic scale, 4K ultra-detail. Made in @dreamina_ai #DreaminaCPP #DreaminaAI

prompts.text: "A surreal Japanese scene in pink and pastel tones using Manga aesthetics. Scene composition: Bokeh background of cherry blossom trees in bloom and flowers floating away gently. Static camera with sharp focus on mid-ground where a centre-frame buff male pianist is seen from the back, dressed in a tuxedo and playing a grand piano. Frame-right is a cool looking male bounty hunter, dressed in a dark blue blazer and trousers, softly strumming a guitar. Frame-left is a female bounty hunter dressed in yellow leather outfit and red short-sleeved shirt, and she elegantly plays a violin. Foreground are bokeh roman columns on either side of the frame."

prompts.text: This is the prompt used in Seedance 2.0 FORMAT: 15s / MULTI-CUT / 5 BEATS / VIRAL EMOTIONAL TWIST SUBJECTS: A small robot the size of a shoebox, boxy body made of dented brushed aluminum with visible rivets and scratches, one flickering blue LED eye (left) and one steady warm orange LED eye (right), two stubby telescoping arms with three-pronged claw hands, and tank treads that squeak when moving. Its chest panel has a cracked circular speaker grille. It moves with jerky stop-start motions and tilts its whole body to express emotion. A single wilted daisy in a cracked terra cotta pot — this is the visual anchor throughout. Stylized 3D quality animation with tactile material rendering, squash-and-stretch on the robot's body, and exaggerated emotional eye animation. ENVIRONMENT: An abandoned rooftop greenhouse at golden hour. Shattered glass panels let warm sunset light pour in at low angles. Overgrown dead vines cover rusted metal shelving. Cracked concrete floor with patches of dry soil. One corner has a small puddle of collected rainwater reflecting the orange sky. Dust motes and tiny pollen particles float in the light beams. The city skyline is visible through broken glass — distant but soft, out of focus. STYLE: Stylized 3D animation, subsurface rendering on organic matter, physically accurate metal wear on the robot. Warm desaturated palette — dusty oranges, faded greens, soft rust tones. Cinematic depth of field with golden hour lens flares. Gentle film grain. MOOD: Lonely tenderness building to quiet joy. Bittersweet but ultimately hopeful. COLOR LOGIC: Sunset Rust — warm amber light, cool blue-grey shadows, pops of green only at the very end. ⸻ 0:00–0:02 · The Discovery Wide shot, 35mm, low angle from floor level. The greenhouse is still, bathed in golden light. The tiny robot rolls in through a gap in the broken glass wall, treads squeaking. It stops. Its mismatched eyes scan the space — the blue one flickers nervously. It spots something offscreen. Cut to insert close-up, 85mm: the wilted daisy in its cracked pot, sitting alone on a shelf in a beam of light. One brown petal falls. SFX: tread squeak, servo whir, gentle wind through broken glass, petal tap on concrete. 0:02–0:05 · The Attempt Medium shot, 50mm. The robot rolls to the shelf and extends one arm toward the pot. Too short. It stretches — whole body tilting forward on its treads, arm telescoping to maximum with a strained ratcheting sound. Fingertips barely touch the pot. It nudges the pot off the shelf and catches it with both claws in a clumsy fumble — nearly drops it, recovers, hugs it tight against its chest panel. Its orange eye glows slightly brighter. SFX: ratchet extension, ceramic scrape, fumble clatter, catch clank, relieved servo sigh. 0:05–0:08 · The Problem Close-up, 85mm, on the daisy. It is completely wilted — drooping, brown, dry. The robot tilts its body sideways examining it. It pokes one petal with a claw tip. The petal crumbles to dust. The robot recoils. Its blue eye flickers faster — distressed. It looks around the greenhouse frantically, body swiveling left and right. Then it spots the puddle of rainwater in the corner. Both eyes lock on it. SFX: petal crumble, distressed beep sequence, servo whip-pan, hopeful double chirp. 0:08–0:12 · The Gift Medium tracking shot, 35mm, following the robot as it rolls carefully toward the puddle, pot clutched tight. It arrives at the edge. Problem: it has no way to scoop water. One beat of stillness. Then it tilts the entire pot and dips the dry soil directly into the shallow puddle — gentle, slow, deliberate. Water seeps into the cracked terra cotta. The robot holds it there. Sunset light catches the water surface, throwing rippled golden reflections across the robot's dented body. Its speaker grille crackles and emits a faint broken hum — it is trying to sing. SFX: water absorption, gentle ripple, crackling hum melody attempt, distant wind. 0:12–0:15 · The Bloom Close-up, 85mm. The robot lifts the pot from the water and holds it at eye level. Nothing happens. One still beat. Then — a single green leaf unfurls from the stem, small and bright against all the brown. The robot's blue eye stops flickering and holds steady for the first time. Both eyes glow warm together. It pulls the pot closer to its chest. Camera slowly pulls back to a wide shot, 35mm. The tiny robot sits alone in the vast greenhouse, sunset light wrapping around it, holding one small pot with one new leaf. SFX: leaf unfurl whisper, both eyes hum in harmony, warm music swell, golden hour silence.

prompts.text: Core Concept: A dramatic contrast between a chaotic wake-up and a polished, professional office look achieved through high-speed "portal" transitions and a continuous spin mechanic. Transition Mechanics: The Portal Smack: Starts in bed. The character aggressively smacks the camera lens to silence the alarm, triggering a warp/whoosh speed-portal effect. The Spin: She lands perfectly on a spinning backless makeup stool at a vanity in the same bedroom. The continuous 360-degree rotation begins, with a new action every time she faces the camera. Character: A young woman with red hair. The prompt strictly uses "The same Character" to lock consistency. Total Duration: 6.0 seconds. Timeline & Scene-by-Scene Breakdown: Scene 1: The Alarm Smack ( - . | Duration: 2 sec) Action: The same Character is sleeping soundly in a real bed, her eyes fully closed. She has messy red hair, a sleep mask pushed up on her forehead, and is wearing pajamas. The loud sound of an alarm begins. The camera trembles and shakes slightly, simulating phone vibration. Transition (The Portal): Startled by the sound, she wakes up abruptly, sitting up fast with an irritated expression. At the peak of her sitting motion, the 'portal' effect activates, visibly 'sucking' her inward, immediately transforming into a rapid portal motion blur with a warp/whoosh distortion effect. Scene 2: Landing & Brushing Teeth (.0 - .6 | Duration: 0.6 sec) Action: The same Character. The portal transition ends as she lands perfectly seated on a spinning backless stool at her vanity. She is still in her pajamas. As she spins to face the camera, she is already brushing her teeth with an electric toothbrush. Transition: Immediate continuous spin away. Scene 3: Hair Brushing (0:2.6 - .2 | Duration: 0.6 sec) Action: The same Character. She spins back to face the camera. She is now vigorously brushing her red hair with a hairbrush. Transition: Immediate continuous spin away. Scene 4: Eye Makeup (.2 - .8 | Duration: 0.6 sec) Action: The same Character. She spins back to face the camera. She is quickly applying mascara or eyeshadow with an applicator, looking focused. Transition: Immediate continuous spin away. Scene 5: Fully Dressed (.8 - .4 | Duration: 0.6 sec) Action: The same Character. She spins back to face the camera. Wardrobe change: She is now instantly dressed in professional office wear (e.g., a crisp white button-down shirt and a navy blue blazer). She is adjusting her collar or cuffs. Transition: Immediate continuous spin away. Scene 6: Morning Coffee (.4 - .0 | Duration: 0.6 sec) Action: The same Character. She spins back to face the camera. She is holding a sleek travel coffee mug and takes a quick, sharp sip. Transition: Immediate continuous spin away. Scene 7: The Catch & Finale (.0 - .0 | Duration: 1.0 sec) Action: The same Character. She completes the final spin facing the camera. She is now wearing stylish glasses. Looking slightly off-camera, she confidently catches a professional tote bag or briefcase that is thrown to her from behind the camera. She looks straight into the lens, completely ready for the day. The video ends here. #YouArt #Seedance2

prompts.text: 2. Seedance 2.0 Upload the generated studio photos (I added one of the car in the mountains) and create your own prompt for Seedance 2.0 I'm leaving you the prompt I used so you can copy it as a base and ask any AI to adapt it to your vehicle and environment ---- Title / Concept “CIVIC TYPE R — DOMINION IN EVERY CURVE” — a 15s high-performance commercial where the car conquers a dramatic mountain road, blending precision engineering with raw driving emotion. STYLE / VISUAL AESTHETIC Cinematic automotive realism, mountain lighting like [attached road image] , high contrast tones, glossy red paint reflecting landscape, motion blur, dynamic environment, premium commercial finish. SUBJECTS Red Honda Civic Type R — aggressive stance, black aerodynamic details, rear wing, triple exhaust, sharp LED headlights, performance wheels gripping asphalt. ENVIRONMENT Winding mountain road with guardrails, dense pine forests, towering rocky peaks in the background, golden sunlight cutting through clouds, sense of altitude and open space. MOOD / INTENT Adrenaline, control, freedom, precision under pressure. The car feels planted, alive, engineered for curves and speed. CAMERA / CINEMATOGRAPHY Dynamic tracking shots, low-angle chase cams, drone sweeps, wheel-level motion shots, fast push-ins, lateral tracking with background blur, crisp subject isolation, cinematic motion blur at speed. TIMELINE 0.0s–2.0s Wide aerial shot of a winding mountain road at golden hour. The red Civic appears in the distance, cutting through curves. Text: “CONTROL STARTS HERE”. 2.0s–4.0s Low front tracking shot. The car charges forward, headlights sharp. Road lines streak beneath. Mountains reflect across the hood. 4.0s–6.0s Side chase shot. The Civic takes a tight curve with precision. Wheels grip aggressively, slight body roll controlled. Background blurs into speed. 6.0s–8.5s Rear three-quarter shot. The spoiler slices the air. Triple exhaust centered. Subtle heat distortion. Text: “BUILT FOR THE CURVES”. 8.5s–11.0s Rapid montage: close-up wheel spinning, brake calipers clamping, steering input, suspension compression over asphalt. Each cut synced to deep bass hits. 11.0s–13.0s Drone orbit as the car exits a curve into a straight. Sunlight hits the red paint dramatically. The car accelerates into open road. 13.0s–15.0s Front hero shot as the car approaches camera and slows slightly. Final text: “HONDA CIVIC TYPE R”. Subline: “IT DOESN’T FOLLOW THE ROAD. IT DOMINATES IT.” End on engine echo fading into the mountains. GLOBAL KEYWORDS automotive commercial, mountain road, Honda Civic Type R, dynamic driving, cinematic car ad, performance, curves, speed, control, golden hour

prompts.text: A 42-year-old Tibetan monk with shaved head and deep-set eyes, wearing layered charcoal robes threaded with faint gravitational lattice patterns, skin marked with subtle fractal scars that pulse with dim violet light — opening frame is a medium close-up of him seated in lotus position on a levitating stone disk above a vast canyon, fragments of rock orbiting slowly around him in silent suspension under a starless sky. His right hand rotates slowly and the surrounding debris begins accelerating, forming a visible gravity well — at second two the ground below implodes inward as the canyon floor collapses into a spiraling sinkhole, triggering a rapid dolly zoom outward revealing entire mountain ridges bending toward his position. He never stands: the right hand amplifies gravitational pull, pulling structures inward; the left hand inverts local gravity fields, sending boulders and enemies upward into suspended orbit. Dynamic orbit camera circles him as debris fields form layered rings around his body, snap zooming into his hands during each gravity surge, snap cutting to collapsing terrain as impact confirmation. Deep violet fills the core frame, while black void distortion consumes the outer edges — lensing effects bending light around him. Escalation builds through increasing mass displacement until a floating fortress is pulled from the horizon and crushed inward. Final beat: hard POV shift — camera becomes the collapsing gravity field itself, spiraling downward through airborne debris into the canyon core as everything converges into a singular point. Gravitational lensing distorts all edges of frame; dust and stone fragments stretch under compression; subtle starfield flicker appears in void zones. Epic cosmic realism, ultra-detailed debris physics, volumetric dust collapse, 4K ultra-detail. Made in @dreamina_ai #DreaminaCPP #DreaminaAI

prompts.text: How to create Hollywood-grade videos from text using Seedance 2.0—now globally in CapCut. [1/3] Step 1: Access Seedance 2.0 • Platform: Open CapCut (or Doubao). • Location: Look for "AI Video" or "Generate Video" feature. • Note: It's being rolled out; update your app if you don't see it. Step 2: Craft your text prompt for cinematic quality BAD: "A man walking in a park." GOOD: "Cinematic slow-motion shot of a person walking through a misty forest at dawn, sunlight filtering through trees, dynamic camera movement following from behind, photorealistic, 4K." Key elements to specify: • Shot type (close-up, wide, drone) • Lighting (golden hour, neon, studio) • Camera movement (pan, zoom, dolly) • Style (photorealistic, anime, vintage) [2/3] Step 3: Use advanced controls (if available) Seedance 2.0 allows control over: • Motion intensity • Aspect ratio • Reference image for style • Negative prompts (e.g., "blurry, deformed hands") Step 4: Generate & Iterate • First gen is a draft. Use it to refine. • Change specific words in your prompt (swap "misty" for "rainy"). • Combine multiple short clips into a sequence. [3/3] Step 5: Export & Integrate • Download the high-quality clip. • Import into your main editing timeline in CapCut. • Add sound effects, music, and text overlays. Use Case Examples: • Social Media Ads: Generate product-in-use scenes in seconds. • YouTube Intros: Create custom, high-energy openings. • Concept Visualization: Show clients a video storyboard from a text description. This turns hours of production into minutes. For step-by-step guides on the latest AI tools, follow @karan_luthra_ai .

prompts.text: 0-3s · Otherworldly Inscription Low-angle upward shot. The void entity's right hand embeds into the altar, dark veins in fractal geometry patterns wildly parasitizing across the stone slab. Fissures erupt with viscous flesh tendrils, the ground pulsating dramatically like lungs. Background sect ancient architecture undergoes visual horizontal displacement tremors. 3-6s · Ossified Mutation Circling ascending/descending shot. The entity's spine explodes and twists in a chain reaction, obsidian horn crown piercing out from deep within the skull. Both arms entwined with liquid black smoke, generating high-temperature electric arcs in the air along its path, suspended lanterns instantly bursting in a visually collapsing overload. 6-9s · Material Deconstruction Pull-back shot. The entity's epidermis displays porcelain-like cracking textures, revealing a writhing dark matter core inside. Fingertips mutate into half-meter-long shadow blades, instantly triggering accelerated decay upon touching wooden pillars, the architectural structure dissolving into rising black smoke. 9-12s · Shadow Tide Devouring High-altitude overhead shot. The entity raises its arm, darkness behind it collapsing then erupting violently, forming a kilometer-scale black-red corrupted tsunami. The shadow flood ravages everything in its path—bluestone pavement, stone lions, pavilions—all pixelated, torn apart, and devoured. 12-15s · Void Finale Facial close-up. In the background, the massive mountain gate twists and snaps like a hemp rope under black hole gravity toward the center. The entity approaches slowly in dead silence, its pupils containing a rotating void nebula. It stares into the lens, the frame generating intense film burning and signal glitch effects, ultimately fading into absolute darkness.

The entity's epidermis displays porcelain-like cracking textures, revealing a writhing dark matter core inside. Fingertips mutate into half-meter-long shadow blades, instantly triggering accelerated decay upon touching wooden pillars, the architectural structure dissolving into rising black smoke. 9-12s · Shadow Tide Devouring High-altitude overhead shot. The entity raises its arm, darkness behind it collapsing then erupting violently, forming a kilometer-scale black-red corrupted tsunami. The shadow flood ravages everything in its path—bluestone pavement, stone lions, pavilions—all pixelated, torn apart, and devoured. 12-15s · Void Finale Facial close-up. In the background, the massive mountain gate twists and snaps like a hemp rope under black hole gravity toward the center. The entity approaches slowly in dead silence, its pupils containing a rotating void nebula. It stares into the lens, the frame generating intense film burning and signal glitch effects, ultimately fading into absolute darkness.

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 on @nsketchai Prompt A dark, cinematic surreal film set in a post-war dystopian city, muted tones, cold color grading, shallow depth of field, soft film grain, dramatic lighting. Scene 1: A cracked empty street near a foggy shoreline. A woman in a long grey coat walks slowly toward the camera. Beside her floats a giant fragmented human face made of broken buildings and concrete, subtly shifting as if alive. Dust particles drift in the air. Scene 2: Cut to a tired child leaning against a broken wall indoors, eyes half-closed, exhausted. In the blurred background, another child sits silently. The atmosphere feels heavy, abandoned, and hopeless. Scene 3: A stern middle-aged man in a grey overcoat stands in a ruined European-style street beside an old rusty car. The camera slowly pushes in as he looks ahead with a hardened expression. Scene 4: Close-up of a woman’s face partially merged with mechanical and architectural fragments. Orange butterflies flutter around her head in slow motion, symbolizing fragile hope. Scene 5: A crowded street under a massive curved wall embedded with small structures and windows. People walk aimlessly, heads down, creating a sense of routine and oppression. Scene 6: A street musician with messy hair plays a guitar into a vintage microphone. Behind him stands a silent crowd. A rusted tram looms in the background. Light rain begins to fall. Scene 7: A line of children in worn vintage clothing stands still, staring directly into the camera. Their expressions are blank, almost haunting. Slow dolly movement forward. Scene 8: A surreal couple walks together. The woman carries a house-like structure on her head, with her face visible through a small window. The man beside her is partially covered in dark soot. They walk through rubble in silence. Scene 9 (Final): A woman sits in a cluttered room filled with old radios and clocks. A sign reading “MORE” hangs behind her. She slowly turns a knob on a vintage radio as static fills the air. Fade to black. Style & Motion Keywords cinematic, dystopian, surreal realism, slow motion, dramatic lighting, volumetric fog, depth of field, 35mm film look, desaturated tones, symbolic storytelling, melancholic mood, smooth camera movement

prompts.text: A cinematic concert gacha reveal in portrait orientation. Phase 1 (2s): Dark arena with scattered blue-white penlight dots. Vertical Japanese text of the character's catchphrase reveals rapidly character-by-character with soft glow. Camera orbits above the audience. Phase 2 (2.5s): Camera swings toward the stage. 8-10 vertical spotlight beams descend from trusses. Steady zoom in reveals spherical footlights along the stage edge. A rainbow-colored ring burst explodes at center with multicolored star-shaped particles scattering outward. Phase 3 (3.5s): Stage reappears with an elaborate gothic arch structure. Penlights multiply into a vibrant rainbow sea below. On the large screen behind the stage, a character silhouette slowly materializes. Camera creeps closer. The glow intensifies into a massive four-pointed star flash, then instant cut to total black. Phase 4 (3s): A blinding white flash erupts. The stage returns dramatically upgraded — golden fireworks shoot upward from both sides of the arch, backdrop transforms into stained-glass geometric patterns in pink, purple, blue and gold. The character materializes from silhouette to full color on center stage. Crossing laser beams sweep from the sides. Phase 5 (4s): Screen floods white, resolves into a close-up dolly sweeping right-to-left past colorful spotlights with dense rainbow penlights waving below. Camera pulls back to center revealing the full arena — arch stage, stained glass screen, character center, thousands of rainbow penlights. Final frame: character illustration in a decorative frame.

prompts.text: FORMAT: 15s / 150 BPM / 8 shots / compact action duel loop SUBJECTS: One occult fighter and one curse-like creature, both drawn as 2.5D line-art characters with visible contour lines, interior sketch lines and light hatching, never solid black fill, one body each in every beat. SCENE: Black and white 3D sketch-anime combat inside a minimal sketch ruin on white paper. Keep clear 2.5D line-art characters with contour lines, interior construction strokes and light hatching, not black silhouette bodies. Start on direct impact, not entry, with both characters already in mid-exchange at center frame. Use aggressive cinematic framing, hard impact punctuation, sharp micro-pauses, strong anticipation and forceful follow-through while preserving left-right continuity and readable strike lanes. The creature uses short curse bursts, limb warping and ink shockwaves. Build the action as a seamless loop so the final rush reconnects directly into the opening clash. The space has floor, broken wall planes and depth, and only redraws on hits, surges or skids. MOOD: Occult pressure, supernatural force, hard cinematic impact, seamless loop energy. COLOR LOGIC: Monochromatic Grading STYLE: 3D hand-drawn sketch anime with 2.5D line-art characters, bold cinematic action framing and readable curse-battle choreography TIMELINE: 1. Smash cut, low 24mm impact track, open on direct mid-clash at center frame as fighter's short strike and creature's forearm collide, lines splinter outward, both bodies compress then snap past each other without stopping, SFX: impact snap, brush tear. 2. Hard cut, 35mm handheld push, fighter pivots out of the pass, shoulder-feints and lands a short body strike under guard, both recoil half a step with visible force transfer, SFX: air slice, ink thud. 3. Whip pan, 50mm side track, creature whips a warped forearm across a clear lane and sheds a short ink shockwave, fighter slips under both by inches, SFX: heavy whoosh, brush tear, ink flare. 4. Smash cut, 28mm close pursuit, micro-pause, fighter plants, twists through the hips and drives a compact rib counter, impact distortion spikes and the camera kicks with contact, SFX: crack hit, ink burst. 5. Match cut, 40mm rear three-quarter, creature skids backward as floor and wall lines redraw under the impact path, SFX: scrape, paper rip, low ink pulse. 6. Hard cut, 32mm handheld orbit, creature slams back in with one arm warping longer, fighter gives ground, parries high and pivots across the axis to keep continuity, SFX: double hit, sharp breath, tendon stretch. 7. Whip pan, 65mm impact close-up, fighter coils low, holds one sharp micro-pause, then releases a decisive upward strike, recoil whips through both bodies and the frame blows out white for a beat, SFX: deep crack, white flash burst. 8. Hard cut, 24mm wide pursuit frame, creature regathers, fires a short chest-level curse burst and surges back to center as fighter rebounds into the same opposing rush geometry as beat 1, SFX: trailing crack, paper hiss, ink burst, rushing foot drag.

SCENE: Black and white 3D sketch-anime combat inside a minimal sketch ruin on white paper. Keep clear 2.5D line-art characters with contour lines, interior construction strokes and light hatching, not black silhouette bodies. Start on direct impact, not entry, with both characters already in mid-exchange at center frame. Use aggressive cinematic framing, hard impact punctuation, sharp micro-pauses, strong anticipation and forceful follow-through while preserving left-right continuity and readable strike lanes. The creature uses short curse bursts, limb warping and ink shockwaves. Build the action as a seamless loop so the final rush reconnects directly into the opening clash. The space has floor, broken wall planes and depth, and only redraws on hits, surges or skids. MOOD: Occult pressure, supernatural force, hard cinematic impact, seamless loop energy. COLOR LOGIC: Monochromatic Grading STYLE: 3D hand-drawn sketch anime with 2.5D line-art characters, bold cinematic action framing and readable curse-battle choreography TIMELINE: 1. Smash cut, low 24mm impact track, open on direct mid-clash at center frame as fighter's short strike and creature's forearm collide, lines splinter outward, both bodies compress then snap past each other without stopping, SFX: impact snap, brush tear. 2. Hard cut, 35mm handheld push, fighter pivots out of the pass, shoulder-feints and lands a short body strike under guard, both recoil half a step with visible force transfer, SFX: air slice, ink thud. 3. Whip pan, 50mm side track, creature whips a warped forearm across a clear lane and sheds a short ink shockwave, fighter slips under both by inches, SFX: heavy whoosh, brush tear, ink flare. 4. Smash cut, 28mm close pursuit, micro-pause, fighter plants, twists through the hips and drives a compact rib counter, impact distortion spikes and the camera kicks with contact, SFX: crack hit, ink burst. 5. Match cut, 40mm rear three-quarter, creature skids backward as floor and wall lines redraw under the impact path, SFX: scrape, paper rip, low ink pulse. 6. Hard cut, 32mm handheld orbit, creature slams back in with one arm warping longer, fighter gives ground, parries high and pivots across the axis to keep continuity, SFX: double hit, sharp breath, tendon stretch. 7. Whip pan, 65mm impact close-up, fighter coils low, holds one sharp micro-pause, then releases a decisive upward strike, recoil whips through both bodies and the frame blows out white for a beat, SFX: deep crack, white flash burst. 8. Hard cut, 24mm wide pursuit frame, creature regathers, fires a short chest-level curse burst and surges back to center as fighter rebounds into the same opposing rush geometry as beat 1, SFX: trailing crack, paper hiss, ink burst, rushing foot drag.

prompts.text: Overarching Concept: Continuous character journey, moving from gritty Y2K streetwear on a dark rooftop to a stylized, high-tech "tech-ninja" aesthetic inside a pristine white iOS interface dimension. Fast-paced, fluid, and highly interactive with the camera. Universal Rule: The same red-haired woman from Scene 1 must appear in all subsequent scenes, ensuring perfect visual continuity. Scene 1 (00:00–00:01): Rooftop Throw Location: Windy urban rooftop at night, glowing city skyline. Wardrobe (Character 1): Y2K style — baggy vintage denim jacket, graphic baby tee, wide-leg parachute pants. Character Continuity: A specific red-haired woman with wavy copper hair. Action & Camera: Static camera. The red-haired woman spins rapidly, her loose clothes catching the wind. Mid-spin, she throws an iPhone 17 Pro Max directly into the camera lens. Scene 2 (00:01–00:02): Giant Phone Spin Location: Blurred night city backdrop. Action & Camera: Focus pulls to the giant, spinning iPhone 17 Pro Max in the foreground. It stops spinning, hovering vertically and centered. Scene 3 (00:02–00:07): The "Twist & Pull" Transition (CRITICAL FOCUS — NO GLASS BREAKING) Location: Still on the night rooftop, phone centered. Character Continuity: The same red-haired woman (from Scene 1) is visible inside the glowing white phone screen, smiling confidently. Wardrobe (Character 2): A tight, form-fitting, cropped matte-black leather motorcycle jacket over a white top. Action (The Twist): Her hand smoothly emerges from the screen into 3D space (the screen acts like a fluid boundary — no glass breaking). She reaches toward the camera and performs a twisting motion with her wrist and fingers — exactly like screwing in a lightbulb or turning a dial. Camera (Max Zoom): As she twists, the camera zooms in maximally on her hand. Action (The Pull): She reverses the twisting motion and rapidly retracts her hand back into the phone. Camera (The Dive): This reverse motion acts as a physical "pull." As she yanks her hand back, she pulls the camera with her — the camera flies rapidly into the phone screen, fully entering the digital interface. Scene 4 (00:07–00:14): UI Dimension & The Final Punchline Location: Bright, infinite white 3D space. Character Continuity: The same red-haired woman stands center, smiling confidently. Wardrobe (Character 3 — "Tech-Ninja"): Full matte-black tactical jumpsuit in technical fabric; asymmetrical layered vest with utility straps; multi-strap chest harness with glowing magnetic buckles; full gloves with integrated digital displays; chunky combat platform boots. Interface Elements: Gigantic simplified floating 3D app icons — Instagram camera, TikTok "d", Snapchat ghost — swirling around her. The Finale: She looks directly at the camera, playfully catches a glowing "Like" (Heart) icon from the air, gives a sharp wink, and throws the icon straight into the camera lens. The icon covers the lens, turning the screen instantly to black — creating a definitive ending or a seamless loop back to the start. #Seedance2

Prompt  

A dark, post-apocalyptic city covered in smoke, debris, and burning ruins, cinematic wide aerial shot, dramatic cloudy sky with fire embers floating in the air, destroyed buildings on both sides, abandoned cars, cracked roads glowing faintly with heat
A powerful female warrior descends rapidly from the sky, long hair flowing in slow motion, camera follows her from above as she slams into the ground, creating a shockwave of dust and debris, cinematic impact, particles flying, ground cracking beneath her
Low angle close-up — she kneels on the ground, breathing heavily, bruised but intense, wearing tactical outfit with torn sleeves, subtle glowing veins under her skin, atmosphere filled with smoke and fire
A glowing energy drink can (neon green accents) lies in front of her on the ground, slightly vibrating with power, cinematic focus shift from her face to the can
She slowly reaches forward, picks up the can, stands up — background explosions flicker behind her, camera slowly pushes in
Close-up shot — she opens the can, a sharp metallic sound echoing, green energy vapor leaks out, lighting her face dramatically
As she drinks — her eyes suddenly glow bright neon green, energy pulses through her body, veins illuminate, wind starts swirling around her
Dark organic energy tendrils emerge from her back and arms, wrapping around her body, forming armor-like structures, cinematic transformation sequence, high detail, slow motion
Her body evolves into a demonic feminine entity, sleek black armor fused with glowing green energy lines, horns forming, wings expanding behind her
Wide hero shot — she fully transforms into a towering, powerful demon-like being with massive wings, glowing eyes, and energy blades forming in her hands
She raises both arms — energy surges through the sky, debris starts levitating, buildings trembling
Final shot — she unleashes a massive green energy beam into the sky, creating a shockwave across the ruined city, camera pulls back to wide cinematic scale
Style: ultra-realistic, cinematic lighting, volumetric fog, Unreal Engine style, high contrast, dramatic shadows, slow motion, epic scale, 4K, film grain, teal-orange + neon green color grading

prompts.text: Stickman Fight with Seedance 2.0 Prompt FORMAT: 15s / 182 BPM / 7 CUTS / minimalist 2D stick-fight animation, pure white background, ultra-fast readability SUBJECTS: Two 2D stick fighters drawn in solid black lines on a blank white field. One is lean, evasive, and elastic. The other is wider, heavier, and constantly presses forward with crushing force. ENVIRONMENT: Empty white void, no props. Only black speed lines, impact rings, smear frames, skid marks, and sharp red blood accents. Clean negative space keeps every move instantly readable. MOOD: Brutal, explosive, relentless, stylish, unfinished. COLOR LOGIC: Monochromatic Grading TIMELINE: 0:00-0:01 - Wide shot, extreme negative space. The lean fighter stands centered and still. The heavy fighter drops from above already throwing a downward strike. Sudden hard push-in. 24mm wide feel. SFX: air drop, hard land, cutting whoosh. 0:01-0:03 - CUT ON ACTION. Side wide shot. Heavy fighter unleashes jab, hook, knee. Lean fighter slips, guards, absorbs the knee, then fires back with calf kick, straight punch, spinning back kick. A sharp red blood arc snaps off the final hit. Short truck move. 35mm feel. SFX: swishes, dry thuds, foot taps, impact ticks. 0:03-0:05 - SMASH CUT. Medium wide side view. Heavy fighter answers with body hook, elbow, backfist, stomp kick, then drives through with a rushing shoulder check, forcing the lean fighter across frame. Quick red flecks burst near the impact rings. Fast lateral move with slight undercrank feel. SFX: impact cracks, whip swishes, stomp hit, air bursts. 0:05-0:07 - CUT ON ACTION. Side wide shot. Lean fighter ducks the next swing, steps inside, lands a rib shot, slicing elbow to the chin, then a rising kick to the chest. A brief red spray snaps off the last connection. Short truck move. 35mm film feel. SFX: duck swish, body thud, elbow crack, kick crack, skid scrape. 0:07-0:10 - WHIP PAN TRANSITION. Side wide shot. Both crash back together and trade a savage twelve-hit chain: punch, block, elbow, knee, duck, backfist, kick, catch, shove, hook, spinning elbow, straight cross. Red flicks burst only on the hardest impacts. Fast truck move with momentum-based cutting. Thick black impact circles on the heaviest blows. SFX: rapid hit flurry, hard swishes, bass ticks, breath bursts. 0:10-0:12 - CUT ON ACTION. Worm's-eye wide shot. Heavy fighter surges forward again. Lean fighter eats two hits, slips the third, steps off the planted thigh, vaults upward, and hammers down. Both collide midair in a tight X-shaped silhouette that splits apart instantly. Quick arc move around the clash. 24mm wide feel. SFX: rising whoosh, hit flurry, double crack, burst hiss, bass slam. 0:12-0:15 - HARD CUT. Monumental wide shot. Both land already in motion, skid a step, rebound, and charge back to center without pause, dissolving into black strike smears and red flecks as the exchange continues. Tiny push-in. End mid-fight, unresolved. 50mm standard feel. SFX: skid scrape, hard swishes, dry impacts, low ring.

prompts.text: This prompt was built purely for text to video, so no reference images were needed. I also upscaled it using Magnific Precision for video, all done right inside Freepik! Just a heads up: Seedance 2.0 is currently exclusive to Business accounts and up. And available on +150 regions (US and some others not included) [CINEMATIC SETUP] Genre & Mood: Gritty Post-Apocalyptic Survival. Tense, visceral, and hyper-realistic. Film Stock & Lens: Shot on 35mm anamorphic lens, f/2.8 for shallow depth of field. Teal-orange desaturated color grade with earthy, dusty undertones. Lighting & Atmosphere: Dramatic volumetric Golden Hour light with heavy dust motes and heat haze. Character Description: An athletic woman in her late 20s, wearing weathered tactical leather armor and dirt-smudged skin. Her hair is wind-blown and messy; her expression is one of intense, lethal focus. Audio Style: Immersive spatial sound design. Detailed SFX of bowstring tension, rhythmic heavy breathing, wind howling through the canyon, and a high-velocity "thwack" on impact. [TIMELINE SECOND BY SECOND] 0-3s: [Extreme Close-up (ECU)] High-angle shot of the woman's face as she aims a mechanical compound bow. The bowstring is pulled taut against her cheek. Realistic light reflections in the eye. 4-8s: [Over-the-shoulder (OTS) Shot] The camera sits behind her shoulder on a jagged cliff edge. In the valley below, a herd of mutated, post-apocalyptic Cape Buffalo with thickened grey hide and jagged horns graze peacefully. Smooth camera push-in. 8-10s: [The Release & POV] She releases the arrow. Fast Tracking POV shot following the arrowhead at maximum velocity. Intense motion blur on the passing rocky environment as the arrow slices the air. 10-15s: [Impact & Wide Shot] The arrow strikes the lead beast in the flank with realistic physics. prompts.text: **Environment:** A frozen glacial valley under pale arctic twilight. Deep cobalt shadows across the ice field with cold blue ambient light reflecting from massive glacier walls. Snow particles drifting through the air. Frozen lake surfaces acting as natural mirrors for diegetic reflections. **Action:** 15.0s sequence. A towering figure composed of crystalline ice and refracting light engages a magma-armored titan whose body glows through volcanic fissures beneath black stone plating. They clash in rapid close-range combat across the frozen lake. Each strike fractures the ice beneath them, sending radial cracks spreading outward. The magma titan’s punches melt sections of the glacier while the ice giant counters with explosive frost bursts that instantly freeze the molten rock. Velocity Ramp choreography: rapid exchanges freeze into ultra-slow motion when fists collide, showing ice crystals shattering and lava droplets vaporizing before snapping back to full speed as both titans slide across the ice surface. **Camera:** Low tracking shot sliding across the frozen lake surface, reflections capturing both combatants. A sudden upward crane move follows the moment the magma titan is thrown into a glacier wall, ice exploding outward. **Style & Constraints:** 8K resolution, photorealistic volumetric snow, ray-traced reflections on ice surfaces, cinematic cold lighting, 35mm film grain, stable geometry, no flicker. Made in @dreamina_ai #DreaminaCPP #DreaminaAI

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 can replicate all currently popular short videos Seedance 2.0 prompt [Style] Y2K Retro Pool Party, MiniDV Camcorder Texture (Camcorder Footage), Overexposed Warm Yellow, Film Grain, VHS Interference Lines, Fast-Paced Beat-Synced [Duration] 15 seconds [Scene] 2000s American Backyard Pool Party, Blazing Sun, Dazzling Water Ripples, Folding Lounge Chairs, Silver CD Player, Rainbow Inflatable Floats, Plastic Whale [Characters] A group of Y2K-styled girls: Low-Rise Bikinis, Belly Chains, Colorful Plastic Sunglasses, Butterfly Clips, Glitter Lip Gloss [00:00-00:01.5] Shot 1: Bursting Out of Water (Close-up / Pullback) DV Boot-Up Blue Screen Flashes with REC Red Dot. In-Your-Face Close-Up—A girl wearing colorful plastic sunglasses erupts from underwater, flinging wet hair to spray an arc of water (Slow-mo), water droplets splashing the lens, grinning wide at the DV as sunlight overexposes to pure white. [00:01.5-00:03] Shot 2: Poolside Stroll (Low Angle / Right Pan) Low-angle waist-high right pan, three girls in sheer cover-ups clutching canned drinks saunter across wet tiles, one snapping a selfie with a flip phone, chunky platform flip-flops slapping the ground. [00:03-00:04.5] Shot 3: Shoving into the Pool (Dutch Angle) Dutch angle medium shot, one girl shoves her bestie into the pool from behind, soda can flying out, body splashing in with a massive spray, the pusher doubled over laughing. [00:04.5-00:06] Shot 4: FPV Dive (FPV Drone Dive) FPV dives from above skimming the water surface, girls lounging on floats soaking up the sun, one raising a disposable film camera (Disposable Camera) to flash the lens. [00:06-00:07] Shot 5: Ice in Glass (Macro / Still) Macro still frame, ice cubes drop into a plastic cup, orange liquid splashing up, the hand gripping it adorned with colorful rubber bracelets, sunlight piercing the liquid to cast caustic light spots. [00:07-00:08.5] Shot 6: Dance Tracking (Tracking / Backward Follow) Backward tracking locked on her face, a girl with wet hair clinging to her cheeks and butterfly clips in her hair sways in a woven bikini amid the crowd, hoop earrings swinging, smiling straight into the lens. [00:08.5-00:10] Shot 7: Diving Silhouette (Worm's Eye / Push-in) Worm's-eye upward push, girl launches off the diving board into a silhouette, sun exploding into lens flare, water droplets turning to sparkles in the air. [00:10-00:11.5] Shot 8: Clinking Glasses (Close-up / Left Pan) Quick left pan, two girls clink red plastic cups, liquid spilling out in golden arcs, eyes squinting with laughter. [00:11.5-00:13] Shot 9: DJ Over-the-Shoulder (OTS / Pull-in) Over-the-shoulder push-in on the DJ, foreground fingers hit buttons on the silver CD player, background girls go wild splashing water to the beat, backlit sprays forming a golden rain curtain. [00:13-00:15] Shot 10: Golden Hour Wide Freeze (Extreme Wide / Crane Rise) Crane shot rapidly pulls up, the entire pool party unfurling in golden hour warm light, packed with people and inflatable toys, water surface shattered into gold. Overlay DV timestamp "08/15/2000 PM 5:47," freeze-frame flickering to mimic VHS pause.

prompts.text: Get the prompt for Seedance 2.0 SHOT: camera_motion: tracking shot movement_dynamics: The camera stays anchored on the central silhouetted swordsman, executing fast micro-pans and sudden whip-pans to frame each incoming enemy from the darkness. The camera shakes violently on each high-impact flash to emphasize the kinetic energy and aggressive strobing rhythm of the scene. ACTIONS: core_action: A heavily silhouetted man in a deep red cinematic void stands in a martial arts combat stance holding a katana. A sequence of massive, monstrous silhouetted enemies rushes him sequentially from the shadows: a hulking bipedal reptile, a giant mutated arachnid, a shadowy wraith with elongated claws, a towering armored brute wielding a heavy mace, and a ferocious winged gargoyle. The swordsman executes blazing, precise katana strikes with authentic momentum conservation. Exactly upon blade contact with each target, a powerful 1-frame white light flash explodes, momentarily overexposing the entire scene and freezing the exact point of impact. Between the strobing flashes, the environment instantly plunges back into deep red darkness, while the defeated monsters immediately dissolve into black smoke or drop out of frame. The sequence maintains a relentless, high-contrast, hyper-kinetic rhythm of shadows, precise physical strikes, and sudden blinding light.

prompts.text: **Environment:** A massive medieval-fantasy city under siege at dusk. Stone towers, cathedral spires, and narrow streets stretch toward the horizon while fire spreads through rooftops and smoke rises into the orange evening sky. Wind currents swirl between the tall buildings. **Action:** 15.0s sequence from the first-person perspective of a colossal dragon in flight. The viewer sees the edges of scaled wings occasionally entering frame as the dragon glides between towers. Heat shimmer ripples from its throat with every breath. At the 2-second mark the dragon dives sharply between two cathedral spires. Stone gargoyles and stained-glass windows rush past at extreme speed. The dragon unleashes a stream of fire across a city wall below, igniting entire streets. Velocity Ramp choreography: the moment the dragon pulls up from the dive slows dramatically — embers, sparks, and falling debris suspended in mid-air — before snapping back as the dragon bursts through a collapsing tower. **Camera:** Fast aerial predator POV weaving through the skyline, banking sharply between towers and rooftops. **Style & Constraints:** Photorealistic fire simulation, volumetric smoke, cinematic sunset lighting, realistic wing turbulence and debris physics, 8K resolution. Made in @dreamina_ai #DreaminaCPP #DreaminaAI

prompts.text: I'm giving away everything I know about AI video prompts. No signup wall. No email gate. No "follow for part 2." Just value. Here it is. THE SEEDANCE 2.0 PROMPT BIBLE: CATEGORY 1: PRODUCT VIDEOS Formula: [Product] + [Hero Angle] + [Environment] + [Brand Aesthetic] "A matte black wireless speaker, rotating on a marble podium, dramatic studio lighting from above, smoke wisps curling around base, Apple product photography aesthetic, 8K resolution, product name visible on subtle etching" Pro tip: Add "product name visible" — AI can render brand text. CATEGORY 2: LIFESTYLE / UGC Formula: [Person] + [Activity] + [Location] + [Time of Day] + [Mood] "A young woman in oversized white linen shirt, sipping coffee on a sun-drenched balcony overlooking the Amalfi Coast, early morning golden light, effortless Mediterranean summer aesthetic, handheld camera slight shake, candid moment feel" Pro tip: "Candid moment feel" makes AI remove the "too perfect" uncanny valley. CATEGORY 3: CINEMATIC / NARRATIVE Formula: [Character] + [Conflict/Action] + [Setting] + [Director Style] "A lone astronaut floating inside a damaged space station, emergency lights flickering red, debris floating in zero gravity, looking through cracked viewport at Earth below, Christopher Nolan cinematography, IMAX aspect ratio, Hans Zimmer-style tension building in audio" Pro tip: Specifying a composer influences the AI's audio generation. CATEGORY 4: SOCIAL MEDIA AD Formula: [Product] + [Lifestyle Context] + [Emotional Hook] + [CTA Visual] "A person unwrapping a sleek tech gadget on their couch, face lighting up with genuine surprise, cozy apartment setting, warm evening lamp light, shallow depth of field on product, TikTok native vertical framing, text overlay space at top" Pro tip: "Text overlay space" tells AI to leave room for your actual ad copy. CATEGORY 5: ABSTRACT / ARTISTIC Formula: [Element] + [Transformation] + [Color Palette] + [Medium Style] "Liquid gold flowing between geometric glass sculptures, morphing into organic flower shapes, dark void background, monochromatic gold and black palette, macro lens extreme close-up, fluid simulation physics" Pro tip: "Fluid simulation physics" activates the engine's best physics modeling. prompts.text: Seedance 2 Prompt Share It executes first & last frame control perfectly. Prompt 👇 High-intensity cinematic action sequence. A man fires a rocket launcher from the rooftop. The rocket blasts forward instantly with powerful force. The camera aggressively tracks the rocket from behind as it travels at extreme speed through the city. The rocket flies between skyscrapers, narrowly passing glass buildings and structures. The environment rushes past with strong forward motion and cinematic motion blur. Wind pressure and air distortion ripple around the rocket. Subtle smoke trail follows behind it. The camera stays tightly locked behind the rocket with smooth directional tracking, no chaotic movement. As the rocket moves deeper into the city, the giant creature becomes visible ahead between the buildings. The creature is actively damaging structures, creating movement in the environment. The rocket continues traveling directly toward the creature. The rocket impacts the creature with a powerful explosion. The explosion is cinematic and energetic, with light, debris, and shockwave effects, but non-graphic. The force causes the creature to lose balance and collapse between the buildings. Dust and debris spread across the street. Buildings shake slightly from the impact. The camera continues forward motion and settles into a dramatic view of the fallen creature. Cinematic, high-energy, directional motion throughout.

prompts.text: Cat master and bunny's sweet honey moments 🐱🐰💛 (created with Seedance 2 on @nemovideoai ) Prompt share 🍯🐝👇 STORY FORMAT: 15s / 150 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D cinematic martial-arts comedy / stylized animal wuxia fantasy TONE: playful charm → sudden danger → explosive reversal → absurd comedic payoff SUBJECTS: Orange cat ninja in a grey outfit holding a jar of honey; White rabbit in a dark green martial arts uniform (cute exterior, overwhelming hidden power); Black bear in a pale yellow robe with a scar on his left forehead, greedy and menacing PROPS: Honey jar, dense bamboo stalks, falling leaves, dust bursts, kinetic shockwaves ENVIRONMENT: Deep bamboo forest with layered verticality, shafts of light cutting through leaves, soft forest ground scattering debris under impact COLOR: Fresh green daylight → contrast-heavy combat tones → radiant energy glow → warm comedic finish CAMERA: Single uninterrupted 24mm Steadicam shot, fluid tracking, whip pans, vertical motion through bamboo, dynamic speed ramps, no cuts 1 (0–2s) BAMBOO STROLL Camera glides laterally through thick bamboo. The orange cat ninja walks casually, swinging a jar of honey while chatting and laughing with the white rabbit. Light, carefree energy. 2 (2–3.5s) PREDATOR REVEAL Camera tilts upward mid-motion. A black bear crouches on a bending bamboo stalk above, scar visible, eyes locked on the honey. A slow strand of drool stretches downward. 3 (3.5–5s) STEALTH COLLAPSE The bear launches silently between stalks—then lands too hard. A sharp wooden CREAK snaps the silence. Bamboo whips and shudders violently. 4 (5–6s) INSTANT DEFENSE The cat reacts in a blink—shoves the rabbit behind him, pivots low into a guarded stance, clutching the honey. His sleepy demeanor is gone. 5 (6–7s) INTIMIDATION DROP The bear crashes down in front of them, kicking up dust. He straightens slowly, looming, then gestures at the honey with a smug, threatening grin. 6 (7–9s) CLOSE-QUARTER EXCHANGE The cat explodes forward—rapid chained punches and snapping kicks, tight and precise. The bear absorbs, blocks, then counters with crushing weight and sweeping strikes. Momentum shifts—power begins to overwhelm speed. 7 (9–10.5s) TURNING POINT The bear slams the cat to the ground. A heavy foot presses down. The ground fractures subtly. The honey jar slips free, rolling across frame. 8 (10.5–12s) RISING FORCE Behind them, the rabbit steps forward. The body expands, silhouette towering. Expression hardens—eyes sharp, presence overwhelming. A radiant energy field surges outward, bending bamboo in rippling waves. 9 (12–13.5s) SINGLE STRIKE The rabbit lifts one hand—calm, controlled—and thrusts forward. A compressed shockwave erupts, distorting the air. The bear is blasted backward instantly, tearing through layers of bamboo like paper. 10 (13.5–14.5s) SKYBOUND GAG Camera whips upward, tracking the bear rocketing into the sky—face frozen in exaggerated shock—shrinking rapidly into the distance. 11 (14.5–15s) QUIET PAYOFF Camera snaps back to forest level. The rabbit shrinks instantly to normal size, expression soft and cute again. The cat stands, dazed—then both burst into laughter and hug. The honey jar rests safely between them. SFX: playful flute lead with fast percussive rhythm, bamboo rustle textures, sharp wood crack on failed landing, rapid strike impacts with deep bass hits, rising energy hum during transformation, heavy air compression blast on palm strike, sudden airy drop-out during flight, ending with light chime and warm laughter. #sd2 #seedance #aivideo #CatsLover

prompts.text: cat master deserves a nice break (made with Seedance 2.0 on @nemovideoai ) Prompt share DAY STRUCTURE: 15s / 148 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D slapstick wuxia-animal comedy TONE: disciplined temple routine collapsing into chaotic micro-mayhem SUBJECT: Orange cat monk in worn grey dao robe, agile but constantly sleep-deprived CAST: Black-robed chanting cat monks (low-energy), White training monks (overconfident), Elder red-robed master cat (silent authority) PROPS: Rope bucket well, wooden bucket, prayer beads, bamboo axe, stone courtyard, rooftop tiles, incense smoke ENVIRONMENT: Mountain temple complex—courtyard → prayer hall → well → training square → rooftops → bamboo forest → dorm room COLOR: Dawn gold → harsh noon white → sunset amber CAMERA: Single uninterrupted 24mm Steadicam, fast whip transitions, gravity-defying follow, no cuts 1 (0–2s) DAWN WAKE Camera glides through temple roof gap into dorm. Orange cat monk jolts awake to loud birds. He freezes... then performs an exaggerated full-body stretch that briefly distorts his silhouette before snapping back. 2 (2–4s) PRAYER HALL ENTRY He rushes straight into black-robed chanting monks. They recite in dull unison. He tries to chant—mouth moving too slow—head dips mid-syllable, almost asleep while standing. 3 (4–5.5s) WELL SNAP ACTION Hard whip pan to courtyard well. He yanks rope instantly—bucket rockets up, water splashes camera. He wipes face aggressively, fully rebooted. 4 (5.5–7.5s) TRAINING SQUARE MISFIRE Camera swings into white-robed training monks. They strike in formation. He joins late, misreads rhythm, and accidentally redirects every punch—monks scatter outward in synchronized slow-motion confusion. 5 (7.5–8.5s) ELDER INTERRUPTION Elder red-robed master appears frame edge. Instant freeze. Orange monk bows too fast, overshoots balance, slides sideways in panic respect. 6 (8.5–10s) ROOFTOP LAUNCH He bolts upward. Camera tilts and follows as he runs wall-to-roof seamlessly, robe flaring. Tiles crack under rapid steps. 7 (10–11.5s) BAMBOO FOREST AXE BURST Whip transition lands him in forest. He grabs axe mid-motion and chops wood at insane speed—each swing splitting logs and launching chips like ricocheting projectiles. 8 (11.5–13s) SUNSET FATIGUE RUN Lighting shifts to amber. Same continuous camera tracks him looping tasks—run, chop, stumble recover. Motion stays fast but posture collapses slightly each step. 9 (13–14.5s) RETURN PASS He walks back through temple gate. Other monks salute. He tries to respond properly but only manages delayed, tired nods while still moving. 10 (14.5–15s) BED DROP END Camera follows into dorm. He collapses instantly onto mat. Eyes close mid-fall. Final frame holds on stillness as wind chime rings once. SFX: playful shakuhachi + brisk percussion engine, comedic taiko “bonk” hits on monk impacts, rope snap + water splash burst at well, fast wooden clack for training chaos, bamboo crack percussion in forest, ending with soft koto + single wind chime decay into silence. #sd2 #seedance #aivideo #CatsLover

cat master deserves a nice break 
(made with Seedance 2.0 on 
@nemovideoai
 )
Prompt share 

DAY STRUCTURE: 15s / 148 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D slapstick wuxia-animal comedy

TONE: disciplined temple routine collapsing into chaotic micro-mayhem
SUBJECT: Orange cat monk in worn grey dao robe, agile but constantly sleep-deprived
CAST: Black-robed chanting cat monks (low-energy), White training monks (overconfident), Elder red-robed master cat (silent authority)
PROPS: Rope bucket well, wooden bucket, prayer beads, bamboo axe, stone courtyard, rooftop tiles, incense smoke
ENVIRONMENT: Mountain temple complex—courtyard → prayer hall → well → training square → rooftops → bamboo forest → dorm room
COLOR: Dawn gold → harsh noon white → sunset amber
CAMERA: Single uninterrupted 24mm Steadicam, fast whip transitions, gravity-defying follow, no cuts

1 (0–2s) DAWN WAKE
Camera glides through temple roof gap into dorm. Orange cat monk jolts awake to loud birds. He freezes… then performs an exaggerated full-body stretch that briefly distorts his silhouette before snapping back.

2 (2–4s) PRAYER HALL ENTRY
He rushes straight into black-robed chanting monks. They recite in dull unison. He tries to chant—mouth moving too slow—head dips mid-syllable, almost asleep while standing.

3 (4–5.5s) WELL SNAP ACTION
Hard whip pan to courtyard well. He yanks rope instantly—bucket rockets up, water splashes camera. He wipes face aggressively, fully rebooted.

4 (5.5–7.5s) TRAINING SQUARE MISFIRE
Camera swings into white-robed training monks. They strike in formation. He joins late, misreads rhythm, and accidentally redirects every punch—monks scatter outward in synchronized slow-motion confusion.

5 (7.5–8.5s) ELDER INTERRUPTION
Elder red-robed master appears frame edge. Instant freeze. Orange monk bows too fast, overshoots balance, slides sideways in panic respect.

6 (8.5–10s) ROOFTOP LAUNCH
He bolts upward. Camera tilts and follows as he runs wall-to-roof seamlessly, robe flaring. Tiles crack under rapid steps.

7 (10–11.5s) BAMBOO FOREST AXE BURST
Whip transition lands him in forest. He grabs axe mid-motion and chops wood at insane speed—each swing splitting logs and launching chips like ricocheting projectiles.

8 (11.5–13s) SUNSET FATIGUE RUN
Lighting shifts to amber. Same continuous camera tracks him looping tasks—run, chop, stumble recover. Motion stays fast but posture collapses slightly each step.

9 (13–14.5s) RETURN PASS
He walks back through temple gate. Other monks salute. He tries to respond properly but only manages delayed, tired nods while still moving.

10 (14.5–15s) BED DROP END
Camera follows into dorm. He collapses instantly onto mat. Eyes close mid-fall. Final frame holds on stillness as wind chime rings once.

SFX: playful shakuhachi + brisk percussion engine, comedic taiko “bonk” hits on monk impacts, rope snap + water splash burst at well, fast wooden clack for training chaos, bamboo crack percussion in forest, ending with soft koto + single wind chime decay into silence.

prompts.text: Sun Wukong is my favorite legendary figure. (made with Seedance 2.0 on @yapper_so ) Prompt share Cinematic hyper-dynamic fast-paced multi-shot sequence, epic mythological battlefield, IMAX film simulation, 35mm Panavision lens, f/4, heavy cinematic color grading, dramatic contrast between dark necrotic tones and radiant golden divine light. Shot 1: Extreme close-up on Sun Wukong’s face, covered in dirt and blood, golden eyes flickering with exhaustion yet defiance. His fur is matted, his breathing heavy. He kneels in the center of a ruined battlefield, his golden staff cracked and planted into the ground for support. Around him, countless skeletal warriors slowly close in, their hollow eyes glowing with eerie green fire. Shot 2: Rapid shaky handheld shot circling Wukong. The skeletal army tightens its formation, bones clattering, rusted weapons scraping. Wukong struggles to stand, gripping his staff, as the undead swarm prepares to strike from all directions. Shot 3: Low-angle shot from behind Wukong. Just as the skeletons lunge forward, a faint golden glow begins to emerge behind him, cutting through the darkness like dawn breaking through a storm. Shot 4: Sudden explosive bloom of radiant golden light. A towering Buddha manifestation appears behind Wukong, विशाल and serene, radiating infinite divine energy. The battlefield is instantly bathed in warm, overwhelming golden luminosity. Shot 5: Fast upward tilt. Rows upon rows of celestial soldiers materialize in the sky and on the ground behind the Buddha—heavenly generals clad in ornate golden armor, divine banners flowing, weapons shining with sacred light. Shot 6: Whip-pan across the battlefield. The skeletons freeze mid-attack, their bodies trembling under the pressure of the divine aura. Golden light surges outward like a tidal wave. Shot 7: Ultra-fast sequence of disintegration shots. The skeletal army is instantly reduced to ash—bones crack, dissolve, and scatter into glowing dust, evaporating into nothingness under the overwhelming holy radiance. Shot 8: Wide epic drone pull-back. Wukong stands silhouetted in front of the colossal golden Buddha and the vast heavenly army. The battlefield, once dark and corrupted, is now purified, glowing with divine light. Golden particles drift through the air like sacred snow. Final frame: Freeze in epic tension—Wukong gripping his staff, head slightly bowed, while behind him the Buddha and celestial army radiate infinite power, dominating the horizon. #sd2 #seedance #aivideo #RPG

prompts.text: Timelapse prompt on Seedance 2 : Locked-off aerial timelapse of the exact same landscape across centuries, with the camera completely fixed and the landforms, road position, tree line, and overall composition always intact. The transformation must feel gradual, seamless, and continuous, as if generations are passing in a single uninterrupted shot. Start with a simple dirt crossroads cutting through open farmland, a few modest cottages, thin chimney smoke, and occasional horse carts. Over time, the dirt paths subtly compact and refine into clearer roads, cottages slowly expand into sturdier homes, small market activity appears, and the settlement becomes more organized without ever feeling like a sudden replacement. As decades pass, more houses fill nearby gaps, roads harden, rails and utility poles emerge carefully along existing routes, and industry grows naturally at the edges. Then the surfaces slowly shift into asphalt, vehicles replace carts in a smooth progression, buildings rise incrementally rather than appearing instantly, and the central tree matures beside a small café. In the final stage, the same streets now carry electric cars and bicycles, lighting becomes modern, rooftops gain greenery and solar panels, yet the original crossroads structure, spatial layout, and visual identity of the place remain clearly recognizable throughout, like a true generational timelapse of one living location.

prompts.tweet_text:
If you can describe what you want, AI will take care of the rest.

Made with Seedance 2 on @runwayml 

Prompt : An adventurer descends from one towering cliff edge to another far below, forging a path downward where none exists, each step creating the way.

He stands at the brink, boots inches from the drop, staring down at a distant ledge barely visible through the swirling mist. Without hesitation, he steps forward into the void. As his foot lowers, a stone tile coils into existence from the air below, locking into place just in time. He descends. Another step, another tile, appears beneath him with a faint swirl of mist and light.

The camera hovers beside and slightly above him, then slowly spirals around, revealing the full vertical drop. The cliff he departed from looms above; the one he’s heading toward waits below, still shrouded in fog. With each footfall, a narrow staircase forms downward in midair, impossibly suspended, leading him deeper into the abyss. The mist shifts with his movement, catching glimpses of the descending path as it assembles, silent and surreal.

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 on @nsketchai Prompt A surreal battlefield in the sky: floating rock islands drifting through a thunderstorm, clouds swirling below like an ocean. The masked ronin dashes across the drifting platforms, pursued by a colossal winged beast whose chest is a swirling vortex of storm clouds and lightning. The camera hurtles from island to island, struggling to keep up as rocks tilt, spin, and crumble away beneath them. Every wingbeat sends shockwaves through the air, shaking the frame and blowing debris and rain straight into the viewer's face. Rapid handheld cuts capture the ronin leaping impossible gaps, sword carving arcs of light that briefly cut through the darkness. The finale shows the camera diving behind him as he jumps off the last crumbling rock, riding a bolt of lightning directly into the monster's chest vortex with a final, all-or-nothing slash that explodes the storm from within and clears the sky in a blinding flash.

prompts.text: First-person GoPro POV mounted on a BMX rider speeding through a dense urban environment. Hands gripping handlebars, front wheel visible. City sounds echo — tires rolling over concrete. At the 2-second mark the rider hits a small ramp and launches onto a ledge. The bike lands — slight jolt through the camera. Immediate transition into a grind along a metal rail — sparks flicker briefly. Velocity ramp: mid-air trick — the bike spins — hands briefly release and re-grab the bars in slow motion. The rider lands and continues forward without pause. He jumps down a staircase — rapid impacts, camera shaking. Final beat: sharp turn through a narrow alley — near miss with a wall. Urban realism, camera vibration, metal textures, cinematic motion, 4K. Made in @dreamina_ai #DreaminaCPP #DreaminaAI

prompts.text: **Environment:** A massive grassland under a violent thunderstorm. Rolling plains stretch toward distant mountains while lightning flashes illuminate the rain-soaked terrain. **Action:** 15.0s sequence from the POV of a lightning wolf racing through tall grass. Sparks of electricity crackle along the edges of the wolf’s vision as energy builds with every stride. At the 2-second mark the wolf accelerates into a full sprint. Rain streaks across the camera as the wolf leaps over fallen trees and rocky terrain. A rival wolf pack appears ahead. Velocity Ramp choreography: the lead wolf leaps through a lightning strike that hits the ground nearby — the moment slows dramatically as electricity branches across the field before snapping back as the chase resumes. **Camera:** Low, aggressive predator POV moving at extreme speed through the storm landscape. **Style & Constraints:** Volumetric rain simulation, lightning illumination, cinematic storm lighting, realistic terrain motion blur, 8K. prompts.text: Childhood nightmare unlocked...cat master fixed it (made with Seedance 2 on @nemovideoai ) Prompt share / #NemoOneShotChallenge / Seedance 2 Prompt (15 seconds total, each shot ~0.6–1.2s) Cinematic dark fairy-tale thriller with comedic twist, eerie enchanted forest, low-key lighting, cold moonlight filtering through dense trees, volumetric fog, high contrast shadows, dynamic handheld camera, expressive character animation, fast-paced storytelling. S1 (0.9s) Wide shot: An orange cat older brother in blue overalls and a gray flat cap runs barefoot through a dark forest, pulling along a white cat little sister in a dirty pink dress, both breathing heavily. S2 (0.8s) Rear tracking shot: The forest behind them echoes with distant howling wolves, shadows shifting between trees. S3 (0.9s) Forward reveal: Through the fog, a glowing candy house made of sweets appears at the end of the path, colorful and surreal against the dark woods. S4 (0.7s) Close-up: The siblings slow down, eyes wide—fear mixed with curiosity. S5 (0.8s) Door action: The orange cat cautiously pushes open the candy door, it creaks softly. S6 (0.9s) Interior wide: Inside, dim warm light reveals a strange room—giant half-open birdcage, scattered sweets, and a bed in the corner. S7 (0.8s) Close-up: On the bed lies a white-haired “grandma” in green pajamas and a white shower cap, blanket half covering her face. S8 (0.9s) Dialogue moment: The “grandma” weakly gestures toward the birdcage, implying there is cake nearby, voice soft and inviting. S9 (0.8s) Insert shot: A cake sits temptingly near the open birdcage door. S10 (1.0s) Action split: The little sister eagerly reaches for the cake, while the orange cat narrows his eyes, scanning the room. S11 (0.9s) Suspicion reveal: Close-up at the foot of the bed—a wolf tail sticks out from beneath the blanket. S12 (1.0s) Action burst: The orange cat instantly grabs a nearby large iron shovel, swings it with full force toward the “grandma’s” head. S13 (1.0s) Impact & reveal: The shower cap flies off—“grandma” leaps up in pain, revealing a ferocious wolf face, snarling before panicking. S14 (1.0s) Escape: The wolf stumbles and scrambles out the door, fleeing into the dark forest. S15 (1.2s) Final comedic beat: The orange cat scratches the back of his head proudly, while the little sister happily eats cake beside him, cheering with crumbs on her face. Motion & Effects: Dynamic chase camera, shaky handheld for tension, fast snap zooms during action, exaggerated character expressions, cloth and fur simulation, soft glow from candy elements, contrast between horror atmosphere and playful comedic timing. #sd2 #seedance #CatsLover #aivideo ( NemoVideo × Seedance 2.0 The One-Shot Challenge) Contest Info: https:// nemovideo.com/workspace/seed ance-challenge ...

S12 (1.0s) Action burst: The orange cat instantly grabs a nearby large iron shovel, swings it with full force toward the “grandma’s” head. S13 (1.0s) Impact & reveal: The shower cap flies off—“grandma” leaps up in pain, revealing a ferocious wolf face, snarling before panicking. When you upload a reference image, don't tell Seedance what's already there.

Focus your prompt on: • How things should move • Where the camera goes • What changes in the frame
